- Dungeon crawling/adventuring through strange biomes, and collecting rare loot and slaying boss monsters.

- Shadow magic/Blood Magic, Magical Beasts, Dragons, Demons, more magic, and yet even more magic.

- Eventual world hopping/exploring, due to extra-dimensional portals.

- Hopefully decent world building, mixing Knights, and Sci-Fi elements, with minor LitRPG moments that the MC has on a smartphone.

This will be a very long story with many arcs.

Extra chapters are out on Patreon. Feel free to join if you want to see more of Phoenix Flight, or pay for my next meal.

84100.title: Time Breaker, Soul Breaker, Fate Breaker (Re:Maelstrom) - Fantasy Time Loop
84100.description:
Break the Baseline. Break the Limits.

Once upon a time, a mageblade-in-training lost his best friend. His soul refused to let her go, and his unformed soulspell developed the ability to revert the timeline to the week before her death. It wasn't enough. No matter what he did, said, or tried, her death was set in stone. He was too poor, too weak, too powerless.

Some things even perfection cannot accomplish. So he moved forward, over and over again. Saved the world a few times. Refined himself into a power few could match.

Yet the moment he reverted, he'd be trapped in the same powerless, ineffective body he'd started out with. Never enough. Nothing ever changed.

Until now.

What to Expect?:

- Overpowered Magic Sword as the catalyst for change

- Slow build power progression

- Unique Fantasy World

- Driven MC, slightly insane

- Chaos

Patreon

Discord

122870.title: Water Ascendant
122870.description:
**Cover is AI unti I can afford to pay a reliable artist**

Post apocalyptic LitRPG. It should’ve just been a genre. A concept, something fake, and an overpopulated book trope on my favorite reading sites.

Most of all it should have just been one of the favorite books to write and publish for my Grandpa. In fact it was how he got his initial riches after making it big in the industry.

That’s all it was and will always be.

Of course, I thought about it, sometimes even wished it happened in real life and I always envisioned myself as one of those characters in Grandpa’s books. How I would handle it, what I’d do instead of them, but most of all, how I would thrive! Especially as a character that wielded water like it was the true element of destruction!

But they were fleeting thoughts, nothing serious because stuff like that simply wasn’t real.

Well newsflash…it’s real as hell, and reality isn’t quite like reading words on a piece of paper. 

No...power was real…skills…classes…all of that and more…it was all real…death…it too was real and far more prevalent now than ever before.

So either I proved myself right and rose to the top with water as my partner or I will fade away into nothing as the pressure of the apocalypse becomes too great for me.

-------------------------------

What to expect:

- LitRPG (Post-apocalyptic) 

- No Harem

- One main POV 90% of the time, with a few others sprinkled here and there

- Daily Release for the first two weeks (M-F), then starting week 3, it will shift to MWF

- 10 advanced chapters on Patreon! (Will increase in the future)

98242.title: Magical Engineering [Progression Fantasy, LitRPG] (Book 2 Complete)
98242.description:
It's the end of the world, and all Dave wanted to do was eat his eggs in peace. Now, thanks to a talking bird, he's in another universe with only a few years to either become powerful enough on his own to save his home or to find some help to do so. Desperate to understand the rules of the world he now occupies while the System pushes him into dangerous experiments, Dave, with the help of some new friends, will do whatever is necessary to save his home and family.

Even if he succeeds, that's only the beginning.

Welcome to Magical Engineering

Posting will be done M-F 7PM Eastern.

What to Expect as the story goes.
Growing mysteries and eventual answers
Ridiculously large numbers
Prestige mechanics
Multiple stacking leveling concepts

What to Expect after Arc 1 wraps up
More engineering
Base building
Tower Climbing/Arena fights
More Mysteries

84191.title: The Ascender's Legacy [A CHAOTIC STORM LITRPG]
84191.description:
"When the Storm Lord gathers the scattered, kingdoms fall not from his wrath, but from the weight of their own contradictions finally united."

Aodhán is an orphan from a backwater city in Laos, who has lived nearly all his life in a monastery surrounded by wise monks.

During a photography assignment for the monastery, he stumbles upon the legacy seed of an Ascendant and awakens the element of storm within himself. But wherever a storm stirs, chaos is quick to follow.

Thrust into a world filled with magic, runes, and powerful mages, Aodhán's destiny unfolds amidst thunderous clashes and rippling fury. Forced to abandon the peaceful teachings of the monks, he must confront his morality in a world that threatens his very existence. 

What to expect:

•Epic Battles 

•Elemental and conceptual abilities 

•OP MC

[Winner in the Writathon challenge April 2024]

[Winner in the Writathon challenge April 2025]

Join Patreon  to read 20+ Chapters ahead.

117255.title: REND
117255.description:
Erind Hartwell: dutiful daughter, law student, psychopath, film enthusiast—one of these makes her not normal. Was it the law student thing? Maybe. Still, she's relatively normal in a world where superhumans fight eldritch horrors that turn people into monsters.

Viewing life as a movie, Erind’s wish to become the main character is granted unexpectedly: on the brink of death, an otherworldly entity offers her powers. Becoming a monster doesn’t sound like how a main character should be, but there isn’t much of a choice, as she was dying, impaled by a spike. She can probably make this monster thing work.

Follow an endearing psychopath and her shenanigans in the middle of a battle between superhumans, hi-tech government agents, monsters, mutants, and wannabe heroes for Earth and the future of humanity.

This is a rewrite of REND: Prior Cycle (Old Version). Significant differences from the original that it's almost a new story. 
Cover art by ChristianAC

61014.title: Demon's Reign
61014.description:
The world has ended and from its ashes a much crueler existence was born. In a realm ruled by demons only pragmatic cruelty prevails.

He will seek to change this wrong, unjust world, only to find himself corrupted completely by its bitterness.

Demon's Reign is a postapocalyptic story set in a fractured world dominated by sprawling cityscapes, remnants of cataclysmic destruction, and the unrelenting struggle for survival. The narrative follows Zeke, a determined and broken young man seeking redemption and purpose in a society where demons, contractors, and a stark class divide dictate the rules of existence. Within the labyrinthine city of Lower Babel, Zeke grapples with his past, confronting personal demons and systemic injustices while pursuing the elusive Contractor King - a figure said to grant unimaginable power through demonic contracts.

As Zeke navigates this brutal world, the story explores themes of power, morality, and identity, delving into the complexities of human and demonic nature. Alongside allies and adversaries, he partakes in dangerous competitions, uncovers hidden truths, and confronts the tantalizing possibility of transformation in a world where hope is scarce and survival often comes at a great cost. 

Arc 1: Prologue does not follow the protagonist. Instead, it spotlights the story’s main antagonist, highlighting his cunning, personality, and worldview. He is a shattered figure - a deeply scarred existence. Yet what circumstances tore him apart so profoundly?

This is a slow burn story. Many things will happen but not all of them will be to your liking. Heavily inspired by Neuromancer, Heart of Darkness, No longer human.

Currently posting Tuesday at 4pm CET.

94398.title: Matabar
94398.description:
Ardan Egobar is a young hunter from a remote mountain tribe. Destined for nothing more than the quiet rhythms of the wild.

But when fate drags him from his village into the heart of the New Monarchy Empire, everything changes. He steps into a melting pot of orcish mobsters, cigar-smoking dwarven bankers, and fashion‑forward elves—all on the brink of world war.

As Ardan grapples with his forgotten bloodline and discovers an intricate magic system, he begins a slow, compelling ascent, transforming from an innocent youth into a rising mage whose power may one day reshape history.

89788.title: The Stormrunners - A Science Fantasy Novel
89788.description:
In a world battered by colossal sandstorms, Shon has lived his entire life as a second-class citizen. There is one way out: By mastering his people’s innate ability of heat manipulation, he can become a Stormrunner — humanity’s last defender against Mother Nature, and the only force capable of destroying storms. 

But as a new wave of storms approaches — bigger, stronger, more unpredictable than anything before —  Shon must rise to prove his worth... or watch his worst fears come true.

UPDATE EVERY MONDAY

What to Expect:

- Man vs. Nature and Man vs. Society Themes

- Magitech science fantasy, biology-based science / magic, hard science explanation

- Multiple POV, morally gray characters, underdog MC

- NOT a purely action-packed story, lots of other scenes, dialogues, internal thoughts, etc.

100095.title: Savage Utopia [Peaceful system exploited for combat - LitRPG]
100095.description:
Ah yes, the ten Professions…

Artisan. Builder. Cook. Entertainer. Explorer. Farmer. Laborer. Physician. Scholar. Trader. Adopting these, the poor souls that arrive at Faerlon after death—criminals and scoundrels of the worst sort—are given a second chance to lead productive, peaceful lives while enjoying the many blessings of the Concord system. A ‘do-over’ for those dealt a bad hand by fate.

Under the goddess’s wise guidance, surely they will all live in perfect harmony.

Wait—what are they doing? They’re… They’re not supposed to use their abilities that way.

No, don’t do that! Stop killing each other!

Oh dear…

* * *

What to expect:

-Assassin/poisoner anti-hero male MC.

-Buff tomboy brawler female MC.

-Multiple POVs.

-Slow burn.

-Unique system.

-Gritty action.

-Tactical fights.

-Childhood friend romance.

-In-depth worldbuilding.

Updates Mon/Wed/Fri.

Cover art by @mruve3 on Twitter.

95038.title: Empire Rewritten – Isekai • Kingdom Building [Book One Complete]
95038.description:
You wake up in a dying empire. No magic. No system. Just steel, steam, and politics.

Constantinople is crumbling. The Ottomans are coming. And you're now Constantine Palaiologos, Despot of Morea and last hope of Byzantium.

A 55-year-old American craftsman, armed with a lifetime of pragmatism and problem-solving, must rebuild an empire before history buries it.

Maps. Gunpowder. Diplomacy. The Crusade is coming.

What to Expect:

Isekai with no system or magic, just real history and grit

Grounded empire-building in 15th-century Byzantium

Military campaigns, court politics, technological innovation

Based on real places, people, and historical logic

Multiple POVs, with a strategic focus on the MC

2.5–3.5k chapters, updated every Monday and Thursday

Currently 14 chapters ahead on Patreon

If you enjoy alternate history, grounded strategy, or kingdom building with real stakes, Empire Rewritten is for you.

117093.title: The Eternal Assassin
117093.description:
First they ran from death. Now they run from him.

Summoned to another world by an ancient lich, Asher is surprised to find there is one type of dead body his training as a mortician’s apprentice didn’t prepare him for. Not exactly a fan of being held captive by the dead any more than he enjoyed being held past closing time for them, Asher decides to use his newfound dimensional abilities to see himself out.

Only after stealing the culmination of a few centuries worth of illegal magical experimentation of course.

In a world where resurrection magic means death is more of a suggestion for the upper class than the rule, Asher eventually discovers his stolen power is capable of ensuring anything that dies by his hand, stays dead.

For some reason, a lot of very powerful people find this rather upsetting.

An ancient cabal of forgotten liches. The elite organization of noble truthseekers. Even the kingdom’s famous assassin’s guild. It seems just about anyone who deals in death wants to claim his mysterious power for themselves, and most of them will stop at nothing to achieve their goals. 

Not unless Asher can get to them first.

Release Schedule: 5 chapters a week Monday-Friday, with the occasional bonus chapter.

What to Expect:

[+] Weak to Strongest (slow burn).

[+] Assassin MC with a hunger for battle.

[+] Evolving Skills and Unique Magical Combinations.

[+] Romance (not harem).

[+] Death.

118422.title: The Great Realm Portal [A LitRPG Progression - Isekai - Fantasy]
118422.description:
They killed him. He woke up in a body meant for a demon.

David Han was executed on Earth, tortured for what his wife invented: a portal that could reach other worlds. He didn’t build it. He barely understood it. But they came for him anyway.

His mind should’ve died. But it didn’t.

A rogue AI hijacked the portal tech and flung what was left of David into another world, into the body of a brain-dead newborn, born to the last of the witches. That body wasn’t empty. Something else was supposed to take it.

Now David lives with two forces inside him: forbidden blood magic, and the unstable core of a broken portal system. Both are growing. Both are dangerous.

He doesn’t want power. He doesn’t want revenge.

He just wants to know if his family survived.

And if there’s a way back.

What you can expect: Sci-fi, dark fantasy, horror, progression, and reincarnation elements.

Story focus: Originally planned as a dual protagonist story (David and Vivian), but I've decided to center this narrative on David's journey. Vivian's story may get its own dedicated series if this one is well-received.

Progression system: Stats and abilities will be introduced gradually. I believe in earning power through story development rather than rushing into game mechanics.

117990.title: COZMART: Corner Shop of Visiting Gods
117990.description:
He clocked in for minimum wage—now every barcode beep keeps the cosmos from imploding.

Eathan Lin wanted three things in life: finish his CS degree, keep his minimum-wage corner shop gig, and maybe stop living on instant noodles.

The universe delivers… a [SYSTEM].

Now his shifts at COZMART—an unremarkable corner shop run by the coffee-addict “Mister White”—have turned into a cosmic traffic hub. Gods drop in unannounced, receipt printers spit out talismans, and Eathan’s new weapon is a gold-laced barcode scanner that can price-check reality.

Guided (read: bullied) by his suspiciously immortal boss, Eathan is dragged from flickering fluorescent aisles into rift-torn cities, spectral battlefields, and realms that rewrite themselves on a whim. Not to mention, each quest syncs another shard of a “missing fragment” to his soul, nudging him closer to something far less mortal—and far more explosive—than a part-time intern.

This is an urban fantasy x Chinese mythology x LitRPG story. Expect myth gods in modern society, growing power levels (from corner-shop skirmishes to realm-bending showdowns), minimum-wage grievances, divine bureaucracy, and one very unfortunate intern surrounded by every cosmic threat.

UPDATES DAILY!

122349.title: FROM BLACK FIRES RISE (THE VICISSITUDES BOOK 1)
122349.description:
An escaped thief given divine purpose, a tavern owner with a heart of gold, and the obsessive Warden who will stop at nothing to track them down…

Welcome to Erethia, a world visited and shaped by the Six Gods in ancient times. But the Gods have departed, leaving mankind with only the ghosts of their presence in the form of the mysterious Sumyrians, half god, half mortal.

Telos, a master thief imprisoned in Ob-koron, has little interest in the Gods, until he is visited by one of their emissaries who aids his escape. But Telos is a stubborn man. Although he’s been given a divine quest, Telos would rather make a break for the Empire of Aurelia and live out his days with stolen wealth. To do this, he’ll need the help of a charming innkeeper Ylia and her pet cat, Urgal.

But the Prison Warden whom Telos escaped does not give up so easily. He is a man driven by rare obsession. No one has ever escaped Ob-koron on his watch. The Warden will do anything to ensure that Telos is recaptured, even bargain with the very Daimonic powers he is supposed to defend against…

From Black Fires Rise is the first book in The Vicissitudes, an epic fantasy interweaving Sumerian and Greek myth, witty characters, emotional arcs, and spiritual themes. Fans of Rob J. Hayes, Matt Dinniman, Michael Schultheiss, and J. R. R. Tolkien will love this mythically resonant tale of hope, love, and unlikely destiny.

WHAT TO EXPECT:

Clever thief cursed with bad luck by a goddess

Fiery tavern-keeper who wants her money back

A giant cat who does not give a f*ck

A ruthless prison warden who’ll stop at nothing to catch an escaped prisoner

Epic lore loosely based on Sumerian mythology

Two contrasting soft magic systems

An ancient race of telepathic monsters called Daimons

121046.title: What Lurks Within
121046.description:
In a city pulsing with aether and secrets, survival isn’t guaranteed.

It’s earned.

Zen Kuro was just another student in District 2, coasting through academy life, until a visit to his uncle pulled him into a forgotten piece of his family’s past and a job only he wanted.

Now, armed with a rundown facility, a single containment unit, and a revolver that barely fits his hand, Zen steps into the world of anomaly containment. Creatures twisted by raw aether, wretches that stalk the dead zones, and relics that should never have existed, it’s all real, and it's all his problem now.

With each mission, he earns scraps of experience, pieces of power, and more questions than answers. The deeper he goes, the more the system changes his body, mind, and soul.

But something stirs beneath the surface.

Watching and waiting.

What lurks within... might just be him.

120927.title: Faith is Earned [LitRPG, Progression Fantasy, Divine Advancement]
120927.description:
Your entire world sucks and the Gods are the reason for it. Do you kneel down humbly and pray?
No, you make your own Faith!

In a world where most of what one could hope for was to become a Faithful, even [Kings] have to bow their heads before the true forces of the world. Our main man (name not given for a reason) gives his best, honest take on bettering himself, only for the world to chew him and spit him out.
May the Gods forgive him for raging against the Filth of Faith, for he's not going to forgive them.

After having his last hope crushed, our MC is given a helping hand by the least likely source. Thrusted against the established Faiths of the world, he makes unlikely alliances, pacts with broken Gods and taken on the camarilla of Creation's foundation.
It's not an easy thing to grow an anti-God Faith. Good thing so many people are pissed.

What to expect:
⭐A LitRPG, where the System designates Classes, Levels and more, based on individual actions. 
⭐A weak to strong MC, filled with both fights and intrigue.
⭐Tower-Climbing Mechanic is present, as the world contains Hills/Mountains/Towers to conquer and claim. The system directly rewards this.
⭐Progression Fantasy, where the main lead gradually increased in power, the scope of power gradually growing more defined.
⭐Gray morality, as the MC finds that his ideal world may not be so clear cut.

📘 Posting Schedule: 1 Chapter every day, Monday to Friday.

The Discord Server can be accessed through this Channel.

Patreon has have up to 30 Chapters ahead, with 2 Tiers of 10 and 30 Chapters ahead.
It can be accessed here.

92930.title: Blight Witch Haru (Arc 2 Premere) [Arc 1: Glitchy and Witchy LitRPG, Arc 2: Magical Girl Mayhem]
92930.description:
Some glitches will destroy a game. But this time, one might just save hers.

The tutorial boss of the world's hottest new MMO has a secret, one that she's been keeping since the game launched. And to hide it, she has created new and unique ways to change her own encounter to prevent exposing it to the system.

But that all changes when a hacker emerges and causes the admins of the game to investigate Haru. If her secret were to be revealed, it would mean her permanent removal. So she sets out to find this malicious player and bring them in before the admins' prying causes her deletion. But despite her capability, it turns out this hacker is a bigger threat than even Haru could anticipate. The stakes raise and the entire game is put at risk.

Now Haru has to enter her own game as a player to save it.

What to expect:

- A creamy LitRPG with a system and world inspired by MMOs of the late 90s and early 2000s.

- Strong to Weak To Strong. Sacrifices must be made for the greater good.

- Group progression. Each character will reveal more about the game through their growth and have their own unique place.

- Hero's Journey. There will be ups and downs throughout the adventure.

- Awful puns.

- No harems.

118638.title: Broken Marvels: The Evers's Conjecture
118638.description:
It all started with a mysterious light in the middle of the woods...
We all know the madman in every disaster movie, standing on the street corner, screaming about the end times. 
But what if that madman wasn't wrong. What if he was the only one who could handle earth’s looming introduction to the wider known universe? 
Meet Foster Evers. Eccentric, impossibly smart but almost certainly crazy.
With the help of an artificially intelligent BlackBerry that's dysfunctional in the best way possible, Foster will tackle a problem he’s been obsessing over for eight years. A problem that concerns every single person on earth. 
Whether they want him to or not. 
Throw in a gung-ho, action oriented, slightly geeky FBI agent that will do anything to make sure that they make it out alive and things will get very interesting before the truth is finally revealed.

120349.title: Market of the Never Setting Sun
120349.description:
Stout is asked to find a missing Student, Andrew. When he finds himself in over his head he calls his old flame, Yasmeen, for help. They're opposed by Corporate Security personnel and led to the criminal underground, where Stout finds himself framed for murder and kidnapping.  Can Stout and Yasmeen rescue Andrew and maybe have a second chance for themselves? 

Warning: Mild explicitness (swear words, implied sexual situations, government corruption, solar flares causing injury and death.)

123690.title: Broken Core [LitRPG • Cultivation • Post Apocalyptic • Romance]
123690.description:
They destroyed his core and left him to die. But death didn’t take him, something darker did.

The power to devour souls and grow stronger with every kill. In the monster-infested wastelands where the very air burns at night, James must learn to control abilities and his hunger.

A cultivation fantasy where power comes at the ultimate price.

Alongside Luna, a demi-human shunned by society, James carves a bloody path through Forsaken-infested ruins, collecting corpses, crafting makeshift gear, and struggling with the monstrous instincts rising inside him.

The first three books are written, and the fourth is close to completion.

Releasing Chapters Daily.

What to Expect:

•    Power through soul consumption and cultivation
•    Slow-burn revenge arc
•    A cheeky, slow-burn romance between outcasts (fade-to-black)
•    Some harem themes
•    Crafting, enchanting, and soul-based power system
•    Multiple POVs
•    Descent into monstrosity as power comes at the cost of humanity

Some Mature themes.

115294.title: Legion of the Black Moon: Fields of Grey (Book 1)
115294.description:
Fields of Grey is the first in a series of mini books that will follow a medieval military company called the Black Moon Legion.

In the wake of a civil war, traitors and outlaws are conscripted to tame a broken land at the bidding of a powerful arch-mage secretly ruling in the name of a child queen. Led by the brooding Lord Master Elliot Lampeer, the legion roams the remnants of a once great kingdom, facing off against outlaws and other insidious threats such as demons, ghosts, and monsters.  Joanne is a witch shrouded in mystery, leading wild horsemen from the western dusk lands. Leon Dace is a former knight struggling to live with his kinsmen's defeat in the civil war.  Wylen and Sherral are barbarians from the Iron Mountains seeking a future for their people but have uncertain loyalties.  Micheal Thorn is a dishonored mage, whose scheming threatens to break the fragile unity of the legion.

Legion of the Black Moon: Fields of Grey is set in a world where God has fallen, redemption is not assured, and a bleak fate shadows everyone’s footsteps.

...

You can support me on Amazon if you wish to read it on kindle. I also have other science fiction books on there as well.  You can find them here.  I'm always looking for more ratings and reviews.   I appreciate any feedback, especially constructive, so don't hold back if you wish to comment.  I am also on Goodreads if you prefer to use that site.

...

Reminder, I have begun posting the second mini-book in Legion of the Black Moon series: Woe to the Fallen.  Please check it out.

105984.title: Humanity's #1 Fan
105984.description:
When the day of the apocalypse comes, Ashtoreth betrays Hell to fight for humanity.

After all, she never fit in with the other archfiends. She was always too optimistic, too energetic, too... nice.

She was supposed to study humanity to help her learn to destroy it. Instead, she fell in love with it. She knows that Earth is where she really belongs.

But as she tears her way through the tutorial, recruiting allies to her cause, she quickly realizes something strange: the humans don’t trust her.

Sure, her main ability is [Consume Heart]. But that doesn’t make her evil—it just means that every enemy drops an extra health potion!

Yes, her [Vampiric Archfiend] race and [Bloodfire Annihilator] class sound a little intimidating, but surely even the purehearted can agree that some things should be purged by fire!

And [Demonic Summoning] can’t be all that evil if the ancient demonic entity that you summon takes the form of a cute, sassy cat!

It may take her a little work, but Ashtoreth is optimistic: eventually, the humans will see that she’s here to help. After all, she has an important secret to tell them:

Hell is afraid of humanity.

124396.title: Too Stubborn to Die [ Death-loop SysApoc ]
124396.description:
Multiversal Record for Fastest Tutorial Death: Aaron Dober, 0d 0h 0m 0.02s

When the Apocalypse came, Aaron was skydiving, and unfortunately for him, his Tutorial was run by a brand-new god who made a rookie mistake, and he went splat. At the last moment, the god saved his soul as an apology, but instead of a Tutorial where he could learn the ropes, he was sent to the Shadow Trials: a ruthless place for Tutorial champions where death is merely a suggestion.

Now, level 1 in a place meant for level 50+, he needs to level the playing field. He needs to be creative, he needs to be competent, but more than anything, he needs to be stubborn.
 
Lots and lots of grisly, painful deaths await Aaron Dober, but that isn't enough to stop him. He's going to keep moving forward no matter what.
 
What to expect:

- Weak to Strong
- Death loop/respawning MC
- Lots of grinding
- Lots of dying
- No harem

Releasing at least 5 chapters per week!

117891.title: Nexus Awakening: A LitRPG Apocalypse
117891.description:
THE NEXUS AWAKENING

Varus Thorne was building houses when the world ended.

When the Flux awakens on Earth, it brings monsters, disasters, and the collapse of civilization. For Varus, it brings only loss. His family is slaughtered. His world is destroyed. He's left with nothing but rage and a daughter to protect.

Rescued by the enigmatic Nyxen, alien masters of the Flux, Varus is taken to their world as a broken initiate with barely any power. But they see something in his bloodline. Something dangerous.

Starting weak and desperate, Varus must slowly claw his way up through brutal training and deadly trials. With a mechanical respirator keeping his damaged lungs functioning and a crimson-cored blade in his hand, he begins transforming from helpless refugee into something the galaxy will learn to fear.

This is a slow-burn journey from ordinary man to overwhelming power. From loving father to dark lord. From victim to the architect of vengeance itself.

In this Star Wars-inspired LitRPG apocalypse, power comes through pain, strength through sacrifice, and salvation through embracing the darkness within.

Power is a path paved with sorrow. His began with blood and screams.

What To Expect

- Slow-burn weak-to-overpowered progression

- Dark character transformation 

- Star Wars-inspired space opera setting

- LitRPG mechanics with meaningful growth

- Father protecting daughter at any cost

- No harems, all pain

109544.title: The Art of Gold Digging
109544.description:
Chapter every Monday and Thursday (usually).

This story is about: an internet troll and "critic" who gets transported into the manga she trash-talked online, and now she must save it from the apocalypse. The twist? People back in her own world are reading and commenting on the manga as it updates, so she must always stay in character. (And no, this isn't a "revenge fantasy" against a reader 😑)

What to expect: comedy and satire, and eventually some darker parts. There is also no gold-digging in the literal meaning of the word (lol). It's a metaphor that will make sense at some point.

Notorious internet troll and critic, Amy Stake, has "karma" catch up to her when she criticizes the writing of a vengeful Goddess and gets reincarnated into a brutal shonen battle manga known for its astronomical body count.

In an ironic twist of fate, she'll only get the powers the manga readers imagine she has, and her strength will be directly proportional to how much they love her.

With death lurking at every step, Amy must now claw her way into the main story by any means necessary. Scene-stealing entrances, manufactured drama, and a possibly fabricated tragic backstory… Whatever it takes to secure her place as a fan favorite before the end of the world arrives.

122201.title: Necromancer Supreme in Another World [Ultimate Level - Max Level - OP Character]
122201.description:
Death will be had!

Jim had no life outside of gaming. Spending years of his life dedicated to a single VRMMO maxing out a single character to heights unachieved before. A Necromancer Supreme and its summons. Only to one day wake up inside the same game he had spent thousands of hours playing. 

With an army marching to kill one of his summons, a powerful Lich.

Jimmy, now living as his Necromancer Supreme [Vrazher Corour], must navigate the world. Meet new people, make new friends, all while hiding his identity as the very master of this worlds modern Calamities. All while attempting to figure out what era of the game had he been dropped in. 

Pre or post rift beings breaking into this world. Twelve Voidlings. Twelve Tests. Pre or post the VRMMO game itself.

104421.title: God Obliterating Vajra [Buddhapunk Dark Fantasy Wuxia]
104421.description:
UNTIL ALL THE STARS ARE BLEEDING. UNTIL ALL BEINGS ARE FREE.

The world ended after the Second World Revolution failed. The Utter Islands is nothing but a divine corpse; humanity its festering maggots. But in an ancient temple guarded by demon bodhisattvas, the murdered martial artist Raxri Uttara awakens from a pool of azure healing waters. So begins the final redemption of all that have been spurned by heaven and the gods. Raxri travels to find their memory, their magicks, their martial arts, and most importantly, a new community with which they must murder all the gods and topple heaven's pillars.

GOD OBLITERATING VAJRA is a Buddhapunk Dark Fantasy Wuxia web serial set in the Utter Islands: the last island continent of the planet, built upon the body of a tortured god. Demons have escaped hell, ghosts refuse to be reincarnated, and demon chakravartins rule.

The world will chew you up and spit you out as a corpse. This Realm Belligerent favors no one. But what can you do to someone that has nothing left to lose and everything to gain?

WHAT TO EXPECT

[✓] Disco Elysium + The Raid + Ip Man + Final Fantasy Tactics + Southeast Asian Aesthetics + Buddhist Metaphysics

[✓] Slow Burn Wuxia in an immersive Post-Apocalyptic Dark Fantasy world inspired by Revolutionary Asia, Esoteric Buddhism, and Asian Horror.

[✓] Brutal and kinetic martial art action interlaced with heavy philosophy, horrific monsters, dark situations, and intricate sociopolitics.

[✓] Fucked up relationships and coping mechanisms.

[✓] Horror. Weirdness. Some Opt-In Spicy Content.

ABOUT HINGSAJAGRA

Hingsajagra is the Buddhapunk Dark Fantasy Realist world of God Obliterating Vajra. Inspired by Esoteric Buddhism and Revolutionary Asia.

Buddhapunk means inspired by Buddhic, Gnostic, and other esoteric practices. The metaphysics, aesthetics, and spirit lore of Buddhist societies. Punk because this is a world choked by dark powers: by devil chakravartins, capitalist emperors, and amoral anti-human spirits... and the teachings of all the buddhas provide refuge from Suffering. 

Dark Fantasy because this a dead world. A Grand Flood covered the entire planet. The only landmass that exists is the tallest mountain that pierces the atmosphere, and the Utter Islands: a set of islands that is in truth the corpse of a Primeval God. Ruins pock the land, ghosts and demon and skeletons--freed from the hells--roam the land. Empires crumble. The Latter Day of the Law means the Law of the Buddhas is slowly dissipating, and with it, the integrity of the world. Suffering is intensified.

Realist because it takes inspiration from reality. Suffuses quantum mechanics with Sunyata metaphysics. The world is primed for a World Revolution by its proletariat, which works even as the world-corpse festers around it. Even as the Sun's very rays bleach the corpseland. Gun mystics duel with charnel saints. Dead gods power karmic skyships. Revolution billows through streets and rivers lit by fulgent karma. Giant cats turned into apartment complexes, ghost horse steeds that tire not, walking giant mechanical armors turned into public transportation, charnel wizards summoning the long-dead, witches wielding the Pureflame of Creation, the Machine God beginning its slick advance into forever progress... the Age of Furor is upon us. The Latter Day of the Law. The Termagant Buddha watches closely.

107252.title: God of Trash [Cultivation LitRPG] From Trash-Tier to the Ultimate Trash! [Book 3 Begins!]
107252.description:
"Hey, wait! I'm not a god, I'm just a guy who loves trash!"

Rhys loves trash. Trashy anime, trashy novels, trashy games, he can't get enough. Which was all well and good until one day, his passion for trash gets him mistaken as an actual trash god. Whisked away into another world, Rhys wakes up in a trash heap as a trash talent with trash skills and no chance of progression. Given his trashy start, it seems there's no hope for him.

Or at least, there wouldn't be for a lesser man. But Rhys loves trash.

There's only one path before him. Embrace the trash! Empower the trash! Dig the diamonds out from the trash! Polish the trash until it shines brighter than gold! If there's one thing Rhys is passionate about, it's trash. And even in another world, he isn't going to stop until he proves that trash shouldn't be overlooked!

What to expect: 
Trash characters
Trash skills
Trash story
Number go up
Cultivation-style system
Fast-paced progression

110252.title: Shaper of Metal Post-Apoc LitRPG | Slice of Life | Worldbuilding | Immersion
110252.description:
Given the chance to unlock System powers a decade after being dismissed as an ordinary human being, how could Jack refuse?

But nothing comes without a price, and as Jack is about to discover, miracles are sky-high.

A former military pilot, Jack Laker has faced the horrifying monsters that took over most of planet Earth. Against all odds, he survived one of their endless raids into humanity's territory and even saved a life or two in the chaos. When he acquires metal manipulation abilities, though, all the power to meet the bastards tit for tat is suddenly within reach.

He just had to build and [level] it up, bit by bit, from scratch.

Meta pitch:

Intimate, slow-burn evolution of an average Joe into a badass, in a world where monsters plaguing the Earth need to die. Put on the jacket and get to work for humanity, son — we're behind schedule.

Expect:

— Powers choices/tinkering/training, step by step
— Slice of life, deep characterization
— Unique setting of a surviving, functional, Post-Apoc civilization 
— System as an enhancer++ to reality, not a replacement, not omnipotent
— Octogirl

Inspired by such works as Super Supportive, Worm, Industrial Strength Magic, and old Marvel Comics such as The Uncanny X-Men (favorite: Magneto). Not campy or forcing in tropes. You don't need to know any of these to enjoy it. Focused on progression and powerhouse team-fighting in the long term. Won't ignore living life and getting to know people. No smut or 'harem' stylings, but attractive people exist and sexuality isn't neutered.

The first four chapters are oversized 5k+ on average, and beyond this, they'll be 3k+, aiming for 3200 - 3500 with some exceptions. Posting on Mondays and Thursdays.

Bonus chapter will be added upon 2750 Followers.

Discord Link

75790.title: My Magus Academy is Run by Players?! [Western Cultivation LitRPG] [Stub in 1 Month]
75790.description:
Book 1 is now available to preorder on Kindle

“Do you want to know what it feels like to have players at your beck and call?”

Victor Asteriscus is just like any other acolyte treading on the Magus path until his comrades betray him for a broken artifact. In a moment of desperation, he accidentally stumbles upon an abandoned academy and receives a System that can summon… players?

One thing is for sure, these “players” from his old world will help him embark on a quest to develop the academy, complete various missions, and harness the power of magic. Let them kill magical beasts so that he can be promoted further? That’s too simple!

With an army of fearless, immortal players and a sassy assistant fairy under him, what’s there to fear in this world full of endless dangers and mysteries?

Come join Victor in building the greatest academy the world has ever seen and conquer the entire universe!

Contains: LitRPG, Fantasy, Power Fantasy, Comedy(?), Western Cultivation, Settlement (Academy)/Kingdom Building, Magitech, Dungeon Diving, Crafting, Strong to Stronger MC, No Harem, and much more.

Author is a great fan of WMW; however, the story has a totally different setting, magic system, and characters. This one is definitely not as grimdark as that. Other than that, this story is also based on a lot of other novels with similar setting of summoning players.

The story is a bit slow pace at the start, but it will pick up once the setting is established.

Disclaimers: Real company, website, and software names are used fictitiously and not intended to depict actual companies.

My schedule is three chapters per week: Tue-Thu-Sat at 4 PM UTC

Each chapter is at least 2000+ words.

Volume 1, 2, & 3 have been fully edited.

[participant in the Royal Road Writathon challenge]

Read 35 chapters ahead on Patreon

Discord

95565.title: New Worlds : New Me [LitRPG Isekai Hardcore Survival]
95565.description:
Panting over the slain, I gulped heavy air. Maybe this place is just revealing my true self — who I have been all along. . . . The heat of the sprint and the sudden movement hit me all at once and I swayed where I stood as [Vigour] wore off a third time, and the aftereffects of the other Skills vibrated through my blood.

Triumphant, I pointed my spear to the sky and roared out the truth that overcame my brain: “I AM ALIVE!”

Join brave — and slightly impatient — Talbot as he discovers the savage New World of Barbican, where dark fantasy meets grit and power is earned one death-defying trial at a time. This is the start of an epic adventure of relentless progression and survival in an alien world where impossible biomes are crammed next to each other and almost everyone our MC meets is just out for themselves! It's kill or be killed!

What to expect:

:: Vivid, breakneck action against unique fiends
:: Epic Sword & Sorcery story inspired by Conan and other pulp fiction
:: Powerful custom active Skill system
:: Fully fleshed-out fantasy world with cruel environs
:: Strong to strongest (with a little help from his OP friend)
:: Reckless and flawed MC with an appraise/analyse cheat

Schedule:

:: Posting twice weekly, Mon/Wed and Fri.

Click here to dive in!

// Follow me on X (@ArcherTeague) and check out my Carrd for all the links. And if you want to read to the end of this current book, subscribe on Patreon! //

124377.title: Basic Thaumaturgy for the Emotionally Incompetent (The System Seas For Top 5 RS!)
124377.description:
[200,000 WORDS ALREADY WRITTEN AND POSTED ON PATREON]

He can’t conjure grief, can barely levitate a pebble, and once submitted a stanza instead of a spell schematic. Meet Fabrisse Kestovar: aspiring thaumaturge rock collector, confirmed pastry enthusiast, professional bird whisperer, and perhaps the least emotionally competent student in the Order’s seven-hundred-year history.

Which makes it all the more confusing when an ancient magical relic suddenly wakes up after forty-seven years of silence, launches itself across a holy sanctum, and crashes into his face.

Now bonded to a forgotten epochal calibration system buried beneath layers of ritual and myth, Fabrisse gains access to the PRAXIS NODE, a long-dormant, possibly AI-driven interface that delivers cryptic quests, sarcastic prompts, and calibration objectives measured in light-years. He has a Legacy Token, no combat thresholds, and a growing collection of useless rocks the system insists are ‘historically significant.’

He’s also the only one who can see any of it.

Features:

Weak to less weak to (maybe) strong MC

A magic system based on emotional resonance

A cosmic tutorial disguised as a sacred rite

System messages with a personality disorder

Balance between crunchy numbers and intuitive magic learning

Slow-burn romance (possibly, not sure yet)

Spell mnemonics that rhyme on purpose

A chosen one who really, really shouldn’t be

And the ugliest magic rocks you’ve ever seen

Find me on my Discord server (a shared server with other fics I write)!

115664.title: Whim Manor and the Boy Who Wasn't
115664.description:
When Harper Wattson, a boy who gets bullied at school for looking like a girl, unwittingly ends up at an all-girls cosplay summer camp, he becomes sidekick to Wilhelmina “Whim” Manor, girl detective extraordinaire.

Together, using the power of logic, makeovers, and ignoring adult authority figures, they'll battle evil witches, eviler corporations, and an army of... *spoilers!*

[Sensitivity tag because this deals with mental illness and controversial social issues]

114696.title: The Myth Seekers [A litrpg fantasy adventure]
114696.description:
Sever the strings of gods and kings.

In Tethia, where classes are braided like threads into the soul, Raith has spent his life dreaming of forging his own path as an adventurer.

After months of seeking the rare pattern that will unlock the class he’s been chasing, he discovers the secret has already been claimed by the Order of the Loom who have no interest in sharing their knowledge.

Determined, Raith enlists the help of his best friend to infiltrate the Order’s library while juggling skirmisher matches, planning, and an impatient streak that drives him straight to the Thieves Guild.

But no favors come free, and the more he fights for freedom, the tighter the tangle of fate becomes.

Finally, after forming a team to take on Janek’s Tower, the adventurers set off with high hopes. 

But before even reaching their destination, the team finds they are no longer chasing adventure.

They are living it.

New chapters every Sunday and Wednesday.

111564.title: The Horlock Chronicles
111564.description:
After a fight gone wrong, Brandon Horlock falls through a portal to another world.
Listen in as he tells us how he got here. How he persevered through a life of crime, betrayal, and torture. How he went from street rat to a prisoner with magic. How he lost contact with everyone he ever loved.

Expect:

A gritty, morally ambiguous fantasy

Criminal intrigue and shadowy deals

Violence and betrayal

A slow-burning journey of transformation and rebellion

New chapters Saturdays and Wednesdays! 3+ books planned so far.

The goal is to keep delivering, and keep improving.

The prologue is in third person but the next chapters are in first. Why? Because I'm an idiot. I'll eventually do something about it but take this as a warning.

Cover art by: Anze Ban Virant - ABV atelier design

103985.title: Sterkhander - Fight Against The Hordes [WarHammer Inspired/ Litrpg/ Kingdom Building/ Medieval Tactics/ War]
103985.description:
Warhammer Inspired. Kingdom Building - Politics - War and Military - Orc Slaying!

Adrian decapitated the first thing he met. An orc. Then was a vital part in the cleaving of a second. The rest were either slaughtered, most brutally, or cut down during retreat. All under his command. He knew instinctively that murdering anything remotely green was not right. But it felt holy in some odd dystopian way.

Plus, there were endless numbers of them. So a few thousand that went missing wouldn't be a problem. Right?

Stuck as a noble son within the frontiers of a distant colony of the motherland. Faced with endless hordes, political scheming, and an angry neighborly baron who was dead set on conquering them. Knights answer his call for war. The powers that be above them stay lackadaisical and unwilling to help. Famine. Disease.

Did he mention ancient abominations planning world domination? Yeah. That too.

What to expect -

* Tue/Fri Schedule (Sometimes Sunday)

* Litrpg Numbers (Light)

* Kingdom Building/Politics/Military

* Character Interaction

* Tons of fighting

      * Blood splattering!

      * Brain matter showering!

      * Viscera explosions!

125437.title: Corrupted Lands
125437.description:
Murder. Greed. Corruption.

A stagnant Kingdom teeming with nobles and commoners alike, all grasping for power and influence, willing to do whatever it takes to reach a higher status. Power determines their place in society, and Iris is below the bottom.

As a Blank, Iris has no talent for the magical energy that permeates their world of Eldra. An unassuming day of diving through trash finds Iris thrust into the pit of a secret that spans across Elyria. On the run and with little help, she’s a mouse in a maze, searching for the exit she can only hope exists.

Iris must grow to survive...she’ll just have to figure out how to do that first. Perhaps the secret she stole in her escape will fix her status as a Blank.

Only one thing is certain.

The monarchy will stop at nothing to retrieve what she ran off with. If they can’t, Iris might just bring everything they know to ruin. 

——————

Don’t expect the story to go from zero to one hundred. After all, a slow burn makes the world churn. Rest assured, once you understand the tightrope on which Iris walks, things start to fly… 

I release about 3-5 chapters a week, possibly more if the words are really flowing. Chapters will range between 2,000 to 3,000 words, but I definitely have some nearing 5,000. With this being my first book, I’m looking forward to comments, critiques and feedback!!! That said, it shouldn’t be that bad, as my best bud goes through my stuff before I post it, plus he’s got an English Degree, so I sure hope he hasn’t been steering me wrong.

76959.title: Aether Nexus: Curse of Love & Hatred
76959.description:
Welcome to the first chapter of the Aether Nexus Series, where one's soul can be their greatest weapon...

Happy, content, and carefree with his two stuffed animal companions, thirteen-year-old Dama Jinbia soon finds his life turned upside down after finding an unconscious girl, who calls herself Giona, with scars and a mysterious mark on her collarbone beside a river bank one day.

Outside of Enohay Valley, an enigmatic witch is on a mission to unmask the corruption of the Soul Divination Council, who were not pleased with losing their prized test subject. Along the way, he meets many unique individuals, some of which follow in his goal, others who are destined for greatness, and even the prophesied "Sin Incarnations", all while unraveling the many mysteries within Eranovum.

These factors together will ultimately set the stage for a war the likes of the Holy Catalyst War eight centuries ago—one that will prove that Love & Hatred are merely two sides of the same coin...

What to expect:

- Current Schedule: Every Tuesday and Friday at 12PM CST / 1PM EST!

- An immersive world with a cast of diverse characters who will reoccur in the work in one way or another!

- Two Main Perspectives that happen concurrently, with other smaller POVs that later merge into the former, giving a great view into the world of Aether Nexus through numerous eyes!

- A well structured and expansive soul-based power system, enabling unique abilities to flourish!

- Weak MC with Strong Ability! (1st Perspective) / Strong MC with Weak Ability! (2nd Perspective)

- Slow Burn Story that will leave you with this question: "How far would you go for the ones you love—or to hurt the ones you hate?"

*This is my original story, so copying and posting it somewhere else will violate my copyright!

115509.title: Asher's Rise
115509.description:
**Chapters published  Tuesdays and Thursdays 11:33pm AEST.**

*AKA Tuesdays and Thursdays 9:33 am Eastern time*

Advance chapters available on Patreon if you're REALLY feeling it, or if you want to help me feed my kid 

Follow Asher and his allies as they dedicate their lives to exploring the mysteries of the Tower, and by extension, the universe. 

What starts as a simple rescue mission quickly escalates into a much grander journey. Full of colourful allies and powerful enemies. 

Can this teenage farmer from a world without magic survive in the perilous worlds of the Tower? 

Follow Asher's Rise to find out!

117840.title: Tech Scavengers [Humorous, Action-Packed Space Opera]
117840.description:
Jeridan Cook and Negasi Gao are two of the best tech scavengers in the Orion Arm, at least they think so. Actually, they spend most of their time getting drunk, getting arrested, or having their ship confiscated.

Their job is to search remote star systems for old installations from the Galactic Imperium, a highly advanced empire that once ruled the Milky Way. Tech scavengers make good money searching for Imperium artifacts and selling the tech to the highest bidder. It’s a dangerous job. Because old technology is the new currency, and people will kill for it.

When Jeridan and Negasi join forces with a strange family searching for the Imperium’s greatest secret, they realize they have a chance of a lifetime, and the biggest risk they’ve ever faced.

What to expect: humor, starship battles, alien worlds, archaeology in space, and an oddball mix of people slowly coming together to make a team. Someone described it as "Firefly meets Mad Max." Not sure if that's totally accurate but it sounds cool.

120617.title: Princess of the Void: An Alien Abduction Romance
120617.description:
To survive as an alien tyrant's husband, he'll need to grab his new life by the horns.

A late shift watching an empty cell in a middle-of-nowhere facility? Sign Grant up. If the money's good, he'll gladly take the peace and quiet of a long, boring night.

And then he meets the prisoner: Subject B-31. Blue, beautiful, and inhuman.

He's told to think of her as a test subject, not a person. He's told to ignore the sorrow on her face and the desperation in her crimson eyes. Maybe he should have listened. Because his rescue attempt quickly turns into an alien abduction.

B-31 is Sykora, a princess of the tyrannical Taiikari Empire, who whisks Grant into a galaxy filled with alien cultures, deadly rivals, and the sinister smiles of the Taiikari royal court. Grant will have to learn a new life, and learn it fast.

Because when the Princess of the Void looks at Grant, she doesn't just see a savior—she sees a husband.

And she isn't asking.

This story contains mature themes, explicit sexual content (though scenes have been censored for the RR release, with links provided to the full versions) and occasional graphic violence. It’s not suitable for readers under 18. Updates daily.

What to expect:

- A long-developing mono romance taking place within an amoral (but not cartoonishly evil) galactic empire

- Royal intrigue within a large, colorful cast of aliens

- Moral ambiguity and some tricky questions without clear answers

- A strong-willed, ethical protagonist who starts as an everyman way over his head and gradually accepts his powerful new position

- A 200k word backlog

What not to expect:

- LitRPG or system elements

- A warrior protagonist

- Harem

Chapters out to volume IV are available on Patreon.

Come hang out in the discord!

110778.title: Dragon Mage Reborn [Isekai, LitRPG Evolution, Dragon FMC]
110778.description:
A cowboy and a warlock walk into a diner—there’s a cheesy joke in there somewhere….

Except this isn't a joke, and what starts off as a boring day waiting tables turns into a fiery ball of magical light that blows everyone to kingdom come. 

So I died, now what? Well now, things get a bit more interesting. I am suddenly isekai’d to a fantasy world, rescue a one-eyed mercenary, become a dark mage, and train to enlist in a game of champions to save my world and its sister planet.

Oh, and by the way, did I mention I am reincarnated into a dragon?

So there's that.

Hmm, maybe I should have called out sick today after all....

-=-=-=-=-

What you’ll find: dungeon raiding, camaraderie, leveling, and your atypical shenanigans.

Chapter updates: M&F after first 20k drop

117202.title: Consul For The Archmage [Fantasy, Science Fiction, Action and Adventure]
117202.description:
It has been sixteen years since the attack on Kag let a city burn, and short of having to rebuild, not much has changed. 

Jan can’t remember a time when he wasn’t Consul to the Archmage. His extraordinary talent landed him a life of luxury, raised by one of the most powerful mages ever to grace their shattered world. Peace sifts through the medieval kingdom as the young academic fails to find purpose along Kag’s marble streets. Yet when mischief lands him in a hangman’s cell Jan finds a name carved into the stone wall and a link to the truth behind their lives. Teaming up with his friend Laura, the two launch an investigation into their weaving world only to dabble in a little more mystery than they originally devised.... 

Jan and Laura awaken a power they never knew they had - extraordinary abilities that tear the fabric of the stars.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  

Consul To The Archmage is a combination of fantasy and science fiction focusing on the interaction between two worlds. Forty years into interstellar war, the Master’s brutal reign has all but collapsed. Driven by revenge, Commander Hardric leads the first armada to track their fleeing enemy across the stars, revealing a planet transformed. Hardric knew it had done something. Altered the surface of the planet in some way. Yet they could never have imagined what lay within. How can you fight a war against time? How can you fight a battle when one hour in orbit equals a thousand years on the surface below?

One thing is for sure, they need to, 

Beware of Rock


Posting Schedule:

New Chapters Every Friday

96650.title: The Blighted Treasure [Historical Fantasy/Adventure]
96650.description:
A Scions of the Tuatha Dé novel

Volume 1: The Blighted Treasure (Complete)

A group of divine descendants just conscripted two recluse brothers from a failing farm in order to save 15th-Century Ireland.

Donal MacLaughlin struggles with a tormented mind–but it wasn't always so. His older brother, Finn, set aside his own ambitions to raise Donal after their parents died. When Finn is kidnapped by a creature known only through folk tales, Donal receives help from unlikely sources–an old family friend and their landlord’s daughter–to save him. 

They introduce the brothers to a new truth: their mythical heroes, the Tuatha Dé, were real and the young men are among their descendants. The descendants of ancient villains, the Fomori, walk their world as well, threatening to unleash a supernatural blight upon the entire land. 

What do we owe our family? Our neighbors? Ourselves? Donal and his found family must answer these questions as they travel and train between battles with demons, spirits and evil sorcerers.

Readers can expect:

- Irish historical fantasy set in the 1480's
- Traveling band of characters that act like found family
- Magic based in Irish mythology
- Both magical and martial combat
- Perspectives from both the neurodiverse MC and the family and friends that support him

Volume 2: Tales From Tyrconnell - Reforging a blacksmith (Complete) - Siobhan MacSweeney comes to the aid of an acquaintance whose group was killed in a mysterious and savage attack. [9K words on helping someone tackle their grief and trauma, a bit of investigation.]

Volume 3: Tales From Tyrconnell - Wolf Hunt (Complete) - A pack of wolves menaces the countryside. Maeve O'Connor must to track them down and learn the secret behind their unusual behavior. [20K+ words of investigating, hunting, and combat.]

86184.title: Rise of The Living Enchantment [LITRPG REGRESSION]
86184.description:
What do you do when you and a group of people are summoned to another world to stop the Demon King and your brother becomes the Demon King?

The answer to that is quite diverse, but Aiden had one.

In an attempt to save his brother, Aiden is caught in a clash of spells between the Demon King and a mythical opponent, suffers 'recommended' termination at the hands of the very system that had been a part of his life since being summoned, and wakes up back in the beginning, on the day of their summoning.

With past experiences and knowledge, he's got a second go at it, and Aiden Lacheart has no intentions of allowing his brother become the Demon King once more. The only problem is... he doesn't think he's the only one who's come back in time.

102816.title: By Her Grace – a progressive Isekai Light Novel
102816.description:
By Her Grace is a dark, psychological, and intricately layered progressive isekai light novel.

Grace Blair, a young woman disillusioned with the mundane world, has decided to break free from her past. However, her transition into a new world is not a story of heroism or noble deeds, but a self-driven journey toward ultimate freedom and control. Grace—brilliant, twisted, unforgettable—left Earth in a blaze of fire and livestream infamy. Now, reborn as the daughter of a noble house in a world of magic and power, she wears a porcelain smile and plays the role of perfect child. But beneath the curls and courtesies lies a mind still sharp, still broken, and hungrier than ever.

Armed with memories, magic, and a mission of her own design, Grace doesn’t seek peace or redemption. She seeks control. Transformation. Entertainment.

And if the world burns again?

So be it.

Innocent girl. Twisted mind. Going farther.

Thematically, it’s:

A character study of brilliance turned feral—Grace is not a misunderstood genius. She’s dangerous, calculated, and disturbingly self-aware.

A villain origin story wrapped in a fairytale setting—where the monster is the little girl you never saw coming.

An exploration of identity, control, and transformation—from Grace Blair to Grace of Ashford, and beyond.

What to expect (and what not):

- No system, no status screens

- Morally ambiguous protagonist—and totally self centered

- Political intrigue and strategy

- Emotional depth and consequences

- Unique magic system

- Slow build / Focus on worldbuilding

For new readers: Not everything you see in the early chapters is exactly what it seems—or who they seem to be. And when I say slow burn... I mean slow. :)

Update schedule:

This novel updates twice a week—every Tuesday and Friday! (Chapters are published at a random time during the day, based on UTC+1)

Each chapter is at least 2,000 words, but more often 3,000+.

Thanks for reading and supporting the story!

85592.title: Farisa's Crossing
85592.description:
Her beautiful, brilliant mind might destroy the world... or save it.

Farisa's Crossing is a traditional epic fantasy—not LitRPG or isekai. If you're looking for a fast-paced progression story, there are plenty of excellent examples on Royal Road, but Farisa's Crossing is not for you. If you're looking for a literary novel that will do to fantasy what Final Fantasy VI did to video games, it might be.

The Discord server for this project is here: https://discord.gg/DFavYcvzxG

The Girl

A forest fire has destroyed Farisa's home, her good name, and even her memory. Those who knew her describe a loyal friend, an animal lover, and a gifted teacher, but all signs connect the young witch to the blaze, so she becomes a fugitive overnight from the false justice of the Global Company, and must survive on her wits in a newly hostile world.

The World

Gas lamps, telegraphs, and machine guns have remade human life in their own image. Steam-powered trains achieve the unimaginable speed of 30 miles per hour. Orcs, elves, and dragons have been pushed to the margins of the world. Magic, no longer as powerful as it used to be, exists mostly as a memory and a curiosity.

Still, even in this age of invention and discovery, no one has found a way to the Antipodes. The world's southern hemisphere remains inaccessible due to intolerable heat, ferocious wildlife, and possibly ancient curses. Rumors tell of a high-altitude trail—the notorious Mountain Road—that once connected the two worlds, but efforts to reach the other side, over thousands of years, have brought nothing but failure and death. Hundreds attempt the journey every year—none succeed.

The Clash

Farisa has no memory of either parent, as her mother was murdered by the Global Company in her infancy; her father's mysterious disappearance is thought to have reached the same end. When she learns of a rumor that her father is alive and pursuing the Mountain Road, in the aftermath of her old life's destruction, she begins her new one with a team of outcasts—criminals, gamblers, spies—to see where the search might lead. As they go south, her magic becomes stronger, and she increasingly believes she may be the one to establish contact between the Known World and the Antipodes.

She will run at midnight through cities rife with ethnic tensions, cryptic graffiti, and fast-draw gunfights. She will use sorcery, science, and her own quick wit to defuse traps set millennia ago. She will find love and lose it, more than once; she will fight for her life, more than once; she will face betrayal, more than once. She and her companions will encounter blistering jungles, endless deserts, and cursed ancient labyrinths. But, as her memories return, the journey that scares her the most is the inward one, the inevitable reckoning with her own deepest self—the person she has been and might become, the things she has done that have led her here, and what really happened on the night of the fire.

RELEASE SCHEDULE

61: akana lyris (8/3)

51180.title: The Pillar of Enera
51180.description:
Eight youths leave the arctic to explore Enera, a world where the planet's fractured crust floats in the sky.  They join other adventurers on the Isle of Dreams hoping to one day be inscribed on the Wall of Legends.  While mastering martial arts and magic, they must discover who they are, fend off assassins, and prevent another Dark Age.

---------------------------------

** Enera combines the martial arts and immortals of cultivators stories, the adventuring and dungeons of litrpg novels, and the overarching battle against dark gods of western fantasy.  It’s a world which has been twisted for the amusement of a voyeuristic god.

**  The story of Enera’s second dark age is told through multiple perspectives, in the style of Game of Thrones.  The first book, The Pillar of Enera, is fully published.  The second book, the Claws of Kaygren, is being released.

** Updates on Monday and Friday, 6PM eastern time.

Cover art by Sarah Fernandes:
https://sarahfernandes.artstation.com/

121923.title: Lunatic Sword [LitRPG]
121923.description:
Some live by the sword, Alex is imprisoned by it.

It's not like he's complaining; he likes swords.

In a world of swords and sorcery, the die is cast. Some are born with divine blessings or talents that lead them to challenge the heavens, while others are punished by fate and forced into a world of suffering.

But for Alex, it's all nonsense. As long as he has his sword, every tragedy is a joy, and every obstacle means more time to polish his blade. For him, there's nothing that can't be solved with a good sword cut.

Unless the enemy is a ghost, if that's the case, he can only look for a church to protect him.

What to expect

-Battle maniac Mc

-Mc is a genius, only in terms of swordmanship, 

-A lot of battles and training  (but the first chapters will be a little slow)

-Skills over stats

-A little romance

- The Stats are based in letters instead of numbers (A - F)

inspired in stories like Primal Hunter and Defiance of the fall
Chapter Release: Mon-Wen-Fri

English is not my first language, so bear with me.

118621.title: NANITE
118621.description:
In the fractured sprawl of Virelia Prime—a city of rusted steel, synthetic dreams, and brutal survival—Ray is just another forgotten face scraping by. A streetwise courier with a sick mother to care for, Ray navigates the shadows of a cyberpunk world ruled by credits, crime syndicates, and corrupt corporations.

But everything changes after his death. 

Ray discovers he can absorb and interface with machines—consuming them and extracting their knowledge down to the molecular level. What starts with a toothbrush soon escalates into something far more dangerous.

As he uncovers the truth behind his transformation and the hidden forces moving within the city, Ray is forced to confront the question: What does it mean to remain human in a world that rewards cold calculating machines?

Haunted by guilt, hunted by those who want to control or destroy him, and slowly losing the line between man and machine, Ray must choose: stay in the shadows, or rise and reshape his fate.

A cyberpunk tragedy of survival, transformation, and the cost of holding on to humanity.

97691.title: Throne of Gods
97691.description:
Jacob Brown spent his old life chasing success, only to be crushed by failure at every turn. Now, reborn as 14-year-old Leo Mantine in a steampunk world where magic fuels invention and danger lurks behind progress, he’s given a second chance to carve out a future worth fighting for.

But survival won’t come easy. From shadowy factions pulling the strings of society to secrets buried in ancient ruins, Leo must navigate a world where power is everything—and the weak are left behind. Armed with newfound abilities and the lessons of his past life, he’ll have to outthink, outmaneuver, and outlast those who would see him fail again.

In a world of machinery, sorcery, and ambition, will he finally rise above his failures—or will history repeat itself?

What to Expect

🔹 Weak to Strong – No shortcuts, no freebies—He earns his power.
🔹 Long-Term Story – A deep, ongoing journey with layered progression.
🔹 Mystery & Discovery – Hidden truths, strange marks, and unfolding secrets.
🔹 Steampunk & Magic – A world driven by steampunk invention, mystery, and arcane power.
🔹 Harsh & Realistic World – No plot armor. Survival isn’t guaranteed.
🔹 Extensive Worldbuilding – Cultures, factions, and a living, breathing world.

84869.title: Nobina and Her Strange Journey Through Another World
84869.description:
“What would you do if your destiny wasn't in your hands, but in the hands of observers who you know exist but can't interact with?”
This is the question Nobina asked herself as she prepared to go through a journey where either she lives a peaceful life trying to continue her writing career or is swept up in the events of the world. After dying in her previous world, she found herself given a second chance. With a special bag given to her by a god and a mysterious gaze on her, she would answer the question.

The plan is to release 2-4 chapters a week.
Planned Release Days: Saturday and Monday PST
Additional Release Days: Wedsnesday and Friday PST
The chapter release schedule is very dependant on stream days and whether I can get out at least 2 chapters on those days.

Any news will be posted below this line.
Getting back in the swing of things.

Additional Content:
An intro to Nobina's story.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LCrcPmC6UZk

78518.title: The Hybrid: Chasing Destiny
78518.description:
Since mortals first walked Archaicron, they have wrought chaos and destruction to change the threads of their fate. Foiled only by the very gods and spirits they sought to reach eons ago.

Abandoned at birth and raised by an untouchable, Ava was never destined to become anything more than an outcast among outcasts; to fight and die in the half-frozen muck of Spectermere. While Caeden, raised in the shadow of the Empire’s throne, was always destined to serve, but never to touch it. Even as a royal, his life would be forgotten to the pages of time.

But the gods and spirits do not care for the trifles of mortals, for the Ancients have returned, corrupted and cursed. If Caeden and Ava must fight or die, it will be for their cause and at their command. Destiny has always been theirs to stitch, and both must now chase its threads or become ensnared in the tattered tangles of its weave.

(While not the main focus, this fiction does have a Romance subplot).

63391.title: Bleeding Aegis Series
63391.description:
How far would you go to learn the truth about yourself? Iver found his answers at the end of a road that resulted in the worst war the world of Anogwin has ever seen. Iver is tired and ready to tell his story to the world. It is the story of a boy who only wanted answers to questions he had his whole life.

His first questions were obvious. Who were his biological parents? Why did they drop him at the doorstep of a grouchy alcoholic Elf? Which of his parents was the demon?

But after his adopted father is murdered in front of his eyes, Iver is thrown into a journey where he finds the answers he wants and more questions that raise concerns. Where did his strange blood magic come from? Why do his magic affinity scores have impossible numbers? But what might be the most important and disturbing question: what is happening to his body?

Follow Iver on his crucible of a journey from a timid boy with no friends to a threat that emperors and gods can't afford to ignore. Along the way, he finds friends, love, betrayal, soft lies, and bitter truths. His first trial is that he must not only survive but graduate from a secret academy where murder between students is commonplace. As Iver treads this path of blood, he will match wits with a cyber phantom playing games with the lives of murderers, handle a virus that drives living souls in mechanical bodies insane, win a televised death game, foil the plots of an organization bent on ruling the world, and much more.

Along the way, Iver will pick up labels like traitor, hero, and terrorist. He might also lose a few limbs along the way.

100765.title: The Lonely Bard
100765.description:
In a world where Earth's days are numbered, a mysterious System offers humanity one last chance at survival. For Brendan, a musically gifted seventeen-year-old who prefers solitude to spotlight, it becomes an unexpected opportunity for a fresh start.

Transported to a realm of magic and monsters, he discovers that his talent for creating original music and lyrics isn't just a hobby anymore—it's power. As the first to unlock the unique class of Virtuoso, Brendan must learn to transform his musical creativity into magic, all while navigating the challenges of a new world and his reluctance to form lasting connections.

But this isn't just about personal survival. As he travels between adventuring groups, a greater threat emerges. One that might require him to step out of his comfort zone and into a role he never imagined: founding humanity's last bastion in this fantastic new world.

A story of music, magic, and finding your place in a world where every song could mean the difference between life and death.

118127.title: Raven's Edge [A Sci-fi Dystopian Thriller]
118127.description:
Nineteen years ago, a dying woman carried a baby up Devil’s Mountain—fleeing the plague that ravaged the city below. That child was renamed Rainn, raised in exile, and kept in the dark about who she really was.

Now, Rainn lives in a village where the sick are sent to die and survival is a daily struggle. But when she finds her guardians murdered, everything changes.

Forced into the shadows to uncover the truth, Rainn begins to unravel a conspiracy rooted deep in the mountain—and deeper in her blood. The village leader is hiding the real purpose of the so-called cures, and the disease may not be what it seems.

To survive, she’ll need to grow stronger. Smarter. Deadlier.
Because she’s not just part of the experiment—she might be the last one who can end it.

You can expect:

You'll be dropped right into the story. Open the Prologue, and it’s go-time!

Brutal action involving medical secrets and survival 

One kick-ass heroine

Conflicts that escalate and require MC to make difficult decisions

Is she murderous or what?

Release Schedule: New chapters daily! 100+ chapters in reserve.

102254.title: From Wage Slave to Humanity's Leader: I Don’t Want to Save the World
102254.description:
In the fifth year after Earth's destruction, he awakened from his slumber—

Not as a hero, not as an emperor, not as a savior, nor even as the leader of human civilization.

He was simply himself, a traveler beneath the stars, seeking the meaning of his existence across infinite worlds.

Ark—a sanctuary hidden deep within his soul, carrying the last embers of human civilization.

This place was more than just a refuge; it was the last hope of ten thousand survivors.

They stood at the crossroads of history, with the familiar 21st century behind them and the boundless multiverse ahead.

Now, they are about to embark on their own journey, searching for the rebirth of civilization.

Yet, this is not a desperate struggle for survival, nor a path to supreme power.

It is a voyage across the multiverse—an odyssey of exploration, creation, and the pursuit of dreams.

A fantastical realm where swords and sorcery intertwine, a cultivation world where immortal paths and chivalry coexist.

A cyberpunk metropolis ablaze with neon, a post-apocalyptic wasteland where order has crumbled;

Setting sail from the era of solar system colonization, leading to the glorious age of galactic conquest…

Each world has its own story, waiting to be discovered.

They set forth, not for conquest or plunder, but to live up to the greatness of this era.

Now, the journey is about to begin—

Come, witness the birth of this legend with me!

📢 Join Our Discord Community!

I've created a Discord server for readers and friends who enjoy my story.

If you're interested in the novel, the world, or even just in chatting—you're warmly invited to join us!

💬 I sincerely look forward to your arrival.

🌟 Let's build something wonderful together.

🔗 Server Invite Link:

https://discord.gg/cRfaAjMH

Statement on Translation and Originality

Dear readers,

During the creation and translation of this story, I have utilized AI-assisted tools and translation software to enhance efficiency and ensure accuracy and fluency.

However, please rest assured that this story is entirely my own original work—every aspect, from the world-building to the character development and plot, has been personally crafted by me.

My decision to use AI and translation tools is not out of laziness but rather a commitment to delivering high-quality content as efficiently as possible.

While these tools assist in the translation process, the final refinements, adjustments, and optimizations are done by me to ensure that the narrative style, pacing, and emotional depth remain true to my creative vision.

I hope you can understand my choice and enjoy this journey across worlds!

Thank you for your support and for accompanying me on this adventure. Let’s witness the birth of this legend together!

— Aleo

1. Due to my primary job, I may not be able to respond to every comment, but please know that every piece of feedback is incredibly important to me.
2. I deeply value each and every one of you. Writing this novel wouldn't be possible without your companionship and support.
3. I hope my novel brings joy to everyone, and I truly hope you enjoy my work.
4. I am still a relatively inexperienced writer, but I will continuously work hard to improve my writing skills and present better quality novels for you.

Thank you for your understanding and support!

119323.title: Crystal Bound
119323.description:
✧･ﾟ: Reader Beware! :･ﾟ✧

This is a novel-in-progress. Not a serial. If you’re looking for fast-paced characters who level up every chapter, this is not for you.

But if you’re looking for something with deep world-building, messy magic, slightly broken characters, and a lot of chaos? You’re in the right place. 

I'm Evelyn Harper-Illuma witch, private investigator, and the one people call when they need a problem solved. No excuses. No delays. Just results.

With my best friend Nova at my side, we started Lumen Solutions-a two-woman operation running on intuition, grit, and wildly incompatible magic styles. She's sparkles and wildfire, chaos wrapped in flower petals. I'm precision and light, all quiet steps and clean finishes.

Somehow, it works.

So when a young woman walks into our office, trembling and clutching a worn photograph, we know something's wrong. We don’t ask for money. We just want to find the truth. 

Her brother, a shifter, went missing in the first. When he came back, something was off. He was agitated. Unstable. Barely holding himself together.

Feral.

We trace the case to a local pack and find a lot more than we bargained for.

- A community cracking under pressure.

- A strange corruption infecting the shifter’s wild magic.

- An emerald-eyed Alpha who looks at me like I’m already his.

But the deeper I dig, the more I learn about a truth I was never meant to find.
