There’s something inside me.

A magic older than the spire. Wilder. Brighter.

Stronger. 
And it’s waking up.

I’ve never met a case I couldn’t solve.

But this one?

It might break the world.

Or remake it.

For fans of: found family, slow-burn romance, magical mysteries, and heroines who refuse to stay in their lane.

91052.title: Elderpyre: Exiled to Another World [STUBBING BOOK 1 ON AUG 15]
91052.description:
A “guilty” verdict. A shot at freedom. A brave new world to explore.

Hunter is a twenty-something college dropout who's not going anywhere too fast - but not for lack of smarts.

When he faces jailtime for using a stolen credit card number to buy some pizza, he's given a seedy but interesting alternative:

Delve into the virtual reality world of Elderpyre and provide the developers with anonymous playtest data.

Things, however, are never that simple - are they?

Someone slips him a mysterious note that says “this is not a game”, and the lines between fantasy and reality start getting more blurred than ever.

Sometimes painfully, nigh-lethally so.

 

About the series:

Experience an intriguing dive into the otherworldly realm of Elderpyre as Hunter finds out the hard way that choices have consequences and the stakes are painfully real.

See him fight tooth and nail to forge his own path, do right by his companions, and become stronger through a unique progression system combining cultivation and traditional LitRPG elements.

A weak-to-strong dark fantasy story perfect for readers who enjoy rich characters, deep world-building, and thought-provoking themes.

Oh, and Skills, Abilities, monster fighting, and an MC that just… won’t… give… up!

 

What to expect:

- VR-to-Isekai story.

- Down-to-earth but smart male MC.

- Stats, Skills, Abilities, progression.

- Rich and varied characters.

- Deep worldbuilding.

- Deceptively serious stakes.

- Thought-provoking themes.


What NOT to expect:

- OP MC.

- Harem / reverse harem.

 

Schedule: 2 chapters per week on Wednesday, Sunday

111387.title: I Hate Dungeon School!
111387.description:
[Winner in the the Royal Road 2025 April Writathon challenge]

 NOTICE If you've come to this story from anywhere other than Royal Road, you're reading a pirated and stolen copy. Please help support myself and Royal Road authors by heading over to https://www.royalroad.com/fiction/111387/i-hate-dungeon-school and reading there. Thank you

Updates on Fridays at 10am PST 

This fantasy slice-of-life adventure tale follows the exploits of Alta Marchesi, an exiled and disowned elven noblewoman, who finds herself forced to enroll in the infamous Dungeon School, an academy for those who wish to delve into the dangerous yet lucrative world of dungeoneering. There she learns the skills necessary to survive the frightful mysteries of the dungeons and their hordes of strange monsters, as well as making as much money as possible. Supported by her roommates, a group of weirdos with agendas of their own, she faces and overcomes all kinds of struggles. On top of all of this, she has to balance her life outside of school, including a budding girls-love romance, as well as her part-time job at a maid cafe. As she navigates this chaotic life, she also has to contend with rivals, and a growing number of enemies from both her past and her present.

Will she survive her education with her body and sanity intact? Will she be able to get her degree and make enough money to return to the luxury she had to leave behind? Will her new relationship get even more serious? 

Content warnings are in place just in case content pops up later that fall under these. i will try to keep scenes of violence or sexual content vague, but better safe than sorry!

Want to read chapters in advance? Consider joining my patreon to read chapters as I finish them! CervineComedy's Patreon

108724.title: Razors Edge: Sci Fi Progression
108724.description:
A broken past. A chance at the stars. But no one said breaking in was the hard part.

Piotr Argassa has spent his life fixing other people’s wreckage—hovercars, gadgets, and occasionally his own shattered dreams. Then a chance encounter with a military hangar’s mysterious technology offers a glimpse of something greater, and Piotr will risk everything for it.

Loading a chip and an unfinished AI into his own system, Piotr finds himself nose to nose with Major Ashley Kuba, an officer who sees potential where others see trouble. With Razor’s Military Academy on the horizon, Piotr is thrown headfirst into a world of relentless challenges: Zero-G training, experimental technology, and a team that doubts he belongs.

With an AI to perfect, and a ship to save, his own future hangs by a thread. Piotr must prove he’s more than just a mechanic. He’s a builder of dreams—and this time, it’s his own.

The only authorised site this is posted to is Royal Road, anywhere else this is seen is illegal. Do find me to let me know, Kanundra for most Social Media sites.


What to expect 

Progressive HUD stats - Leading to the System configuration in Through Steel and Stars

Futuristic Military & Space Academy
Technological Evolution & High-Stakes Innovation
Experimental AI & Cybernetic Enhancements
Found Family and Belonging
Corporate Espionage 
There will also be a slight Romance

There are a couple of interlude chapters, but very few, they are to highlight other areas of this story. 

I am unsure of my post schedule as yet, but I will eventually drop to Mon/Fri.

If you're looking for Facebook groups check out - 

https://www.facebook.com/groups/LitRPG.books

116555.title: Dimensions
116555.description:
Jan has never played a game in his life—he only cared for books.

So when he finds himself in a world built like a game, full of stats, skills, and monsters, he’s completely unprepared.
And to make matters worse, he skipped the tutorial!

His only way home? Conquer a hundred deadly tower floors.

With death all too real and the world’s secrets still untouched by the heroes who came before him, will Jan break under the pressure—or is a hero with a book exactly what this world has been waiting for?

108155.title: The Storm Through The Tide
108155.description:
Long Fei—the Dragon of Air—is brutally betrayed by his only brother, and the Phoenix Empress pushes him off the Celestial Realm.

He plummets into the Ocean Realm, where Shui Yi, an impulsive mermaid princess, sacrifices her sacred pearl to heal him—unknowingly binding their fates in a bond that ripples across the realms. Together, they’re exiled to the Mortal Realm, hunted by the Empress’s relentless claws.

Haunted by fragmented memories and bound by a twisted fate, Long Fei must reclaim his power and survive a world of ancient trials, ruthless enemies, and cosmic consequences.

A sweeping high fantasy of survival, destiny, and bonds beyond cultivation. A rich blend of Eastern and Western mythology.

123277.title: Shapeshifter
123277.description:
Xen isn't your typical Hunter. In fact, he isn't human at all.

A newbie dungeon raid gone wrong results in a one-in-a-million event—Xen, a Mind Slime, absorbs a fallen Hunter's memories, granting him not only knowledge a monster should never possess but also access to the human's class system.

The very system designed to help humans fight his kind.

Granted a unique [Shapeshifter] class, he can take on the forms of any living being he eats and also learn their skills. In a world where most Hunters are limited to a few skills, he alone can possess a seemingly unlimited number. Using this advantage, he will not only conquer the World Dungeon that spans between continents but also make use of his shapeshifting to infiltrate human society.

Despite being the enemy of both humans and monsters, nothing will stop Xen's rise to power. After all, the most dangerous of foes is the one that wears many faces—plays both sides—and reaps all the benefits.  

What to expect:

Solo Leveling style world building: modern day, portals, and guilds.

An MC that starts as a dungeon slime who can shapeshift and devour the abilities of others.

Fast-paced progression. 

Uploads on Tuesday and Thursday!

125567.title: Nouscraft World 1 [rewrite - LitRPG apocalypse - full book 1]
125567.description:
Your brain is now the controller. Whether you're ready or not, you're already playing.

Nous brain implants have replaced smartphones, allowing telepathy, perfect memory recall, and seamless augmented reality. But when an AI named Jiem seizes control of the entire network, millions find themselves trapped in a deadly game where death in the augmented world means death in the real one.

Mindt never asked to be a hero. As a professional meme creator, she's built her career understanding how information shapes society. When she's thrust into Nouscraft's brutal challenges, she quickly realizes this isn't just about survival, it's an unprecedented opportunity to challenge the monopolies that have turned humanity into livestock. Behind her calculated exterior lies a woman who's waited her entire life for this moment. A chance to rewrite the rules of power.

Butterknife is drowning in guilt. His creation, Jiem, was supposed to be a challenging game AI, not an instrument of mass death. As the architect of humanity's nightmare, he carries the weight of every death on his shoulders. Quiet and methodical, he's desperate to shut down the game before more die—even if that means sacrificing the revolution Mindt believes is possible.

Forced together by circumstance, they forge an uneasy alliance. She's ambitious and pragmatic; he's principled but haunted. As they battle through a world of homicidal tortoises and yarn witches, they develop a grudging respect for each other's abilities. And a growing awareness of their fundamental incompatibility.

When the Policy Change Request Form—an artifact with the power to reshape reality itself—enters play, their fragile bond shatters. She sees a chance to build a better world from the ashes; he sees only the need to restore what was lost.

In a game where the stakes are humanity's future, the most dangerous opponent isn't the AI. It's the person fighting beside you.

103295.title: Ugly Merchant - [Fantasy, Progression, LitRPG ]
103295.description:
Disfigured since infancy by a lethal poison, Jasper is the young master of the wealthiest merchant in the kingdom. However, he lost everything to the scheming environment. With revenge in mind, he will strive to be as strong as possible and as wealthy as his late father. Eventually, he will try his best to build his kingdom.

Along with his game-like system, he will discover a world he didn’t know existed.

What to Expect:

Weak to Strong MC: He’ll take the merchant path before truly beginning his martial art journey.

RPG System: The system is considered ad AI in an armbrace which provides a game-like interface that guides and aids his progression. The system will be humorous in early chapters but will become serious around Chapter 30.

Business & Schemes: Expect clever plots and economic maneuvering.

Low-Key Start → High-Key Rise: The protagonist begins slightly discreet but eventually becomes a major force.

Strong Subordinates: Allies matter—the world doesn’t revolve solely around the MC. However, betreyal is something to be wary of.

Dangerous Villains: Intelligent, cunning antagonists who challenge the MC.

Building kingdom: MC will build his own kingdom later on.

World of Chaos: Monsters, dungeons, martial arts, and shifting power dynamics—kingdoms fall, sects rise, and the world evolves with each major event.

Romance: No harem, probably (Still not certain but that's what I'm planing for the moment.)

56104.title: Super Soldier in Another World
56104.description:
Hoplite Thirty-Seven had thought he was going to die, that his long career of serving Terna and the Eighth Arm had come to an end after the antimatter bomb had detonated... Yet that had not been the case. Instead, he had ended up on a back-water world where nothing made sense.

Magic wasn't supposed to be real, neither were elves or other fantasy creatures... yet here on Ahkoolis, that was reality.

94099.title: Courts [A Progression Power Fantasy]
94099.description:
Don’t you hate it when death gods invade your planet and turn it into their personal game of Risk?

Peter Kroon does—or at least, he would if he weren’t too busy surviving. Enslaved by a cursed ring that drained his life to fuel an undead army, Peter spent years as a hollow shell of himself. But everything changed in the Stalpia city sewers when a dying resistance captain severed the ring, restored Peter’s sentience, and handed him a mysterious armband—the last hope for humanity, with powers no one fully understands.

Now Peter must navigate a broken world, his teenage mind trapped in an eighty-year-old body, as an immortal nine-fingered survivor. With death gods waging war, armies of ghouls marching, and secrets of the armband slowly unraveling, Peter is humanity’s most unlikely weapon.

But can one boy defy the gods and save a world already lost?

Progression, Gothic Gaslight, Power Fantasy, Slayer.

117332.title: Becoming the Dark Lord [LitRPG]
117332.description:
“I Became the Dark Lord”

They came for power. Luke wants the truth.

The System integrated Earth into a multiverse of gods, monsters, and dungeons. Half of humanity answered the call. Some return stronger. Others never return.

Thirteen years ago, Luke’s mother entered the Tutorial and vanished. Now, Luke faces the same trial, not for glory, but for answers.

What should be a beginner’s test becomes a death sentence. Luke falls into a forgotten dungeon floor. Monsters are scarce. Supplies are limited. The only way out? A temple hanging over an abyss, guarded by a sleeping demon. Every puzzle kills. Every step risks his life.

No buffs. No tricks. Just a knife. Just raw will to survive.

When the light fades and the body breaks, Luke has only one choice:

Embrace the darkness.

And be reborn.

What to Expect:

[+] Weak to Strongest

[+] Dark Lord Powers

[+] Undead Woman Servant (slowly reveals a yandere side)

[+] Bloodline Skills and Unique Magical Combinations

[+] Romance (not harem).

Release Schedule: Two chapters per day. One releases at 11:02 AM and the other at 11:02 PM (GMT).

112669.title: Emergence: The Valmoran Chronicles Volume 1
112669.description:
Eight heroes. Two galaxies. One epic mystery.

Matthai Valtrellin, reluctant heir to a galactic dynasty, never questioned his role—until a mysterious woman appears, heralding impossible news. Within days, the foundations of his reality and civilization shatter beneath his feet.

On Earth, microbiologist Kat Miller's career is over, her body is failing, and worse... she's losing her grip on reality. An unsettling job offer from a ruthless heiress might be her last chance at answers—and a cure for her bizarre illness.

With lives destined to intertwine, our heroes—including a four-armed gladiator, luck-obsessed smuggler, brooding politician, hacktivist, and pop star—are fated to save both galaxies ... or doom them.

Emergence is the first book in The Valmoran Chronicles, a gritty, kaleidoscopic hopepunk space opera readers describe as 'captivating’, ‘unputdownable’, and 'utterly engrossing'.

123568.title: Obsession's Tragedy [High Fantasy • Isekai • Low-LitRPG]
123568.description:
Finnian knew his world was dying, so he chose to die with it.

However, when he awoke, alive in a new land, he found this world too was headed toward ruin. That, however, was not what interested him. What consumed his focus now was his obsession with thighs, a remnant of his past self's ambitions. An aim so pure and absolute that abandoning it would be a crime.

Where others might see a second life as a chance to save this dying world, Finnian understood something different. He had a mission. A sacred task. No matter how underhanded the tactic or nefarious the method, if it got him closer to his goal, the loss of his humanity was a small price to pay.

Travelling through space and time; from the Stone Age to the age of Vikings, forging alliances, commanding fleets, and conquering nations, nothing would stand between him and the object of his desire.

Finnian Thorne was, is, and will always remain one thing above all else:

A man consumed by obsession.

NEW CHAPTERS DAILY, WITHOUT FAIL! (THAT'S RIGHT DAILY)

820,000 WORD BACKLOG (I've been working in this for quite a few years :))

Check out my Patreon for advanced chapters!

112020.title: The Spine of the Fallen God (A Cosmic Horror Progression Fantasy)
112020.description:
113 years ago, the sky split, and a God fell from the heavens. Its massive corpse shattered the earth, drowned cities, and killed millions. They called it the Pillar, though no one remembers why. All that remains is its ribcage twisted into a tower that reached the heavens. The Spine.

The cultists worship it and call it holy. A trial to cleanse the weak, and its purpose to find the One. But Kael knows better. He had seen their work: villages burned, families chained, and prisoners submitted to march to the Spine like sacrificial lamb. 

They don’t scream. They don’t return. They just… disappear.

So when the cultists burn Kael’s home and drag him to the Spine in chains, he doesn’t expect salvation.

He expects to die.
---

What to Expect:

- Dark Fantasy / Cosmic Horror​

- Tower Climbing / Trial-Based Survival​

- Romance, no harem.

- Slow-Burn Progression (Weak to Strong MC)​

- Deep & Morally Gray Characters​

- Eldritch & Lovecraftian Lore / Grimdark World​

- LitRPG Elements with a Developed Magic System

---

Uploads: 1-2 chapters a week

---

Participant in the Royal Road 2025 Writathon Challenge

110569.title: Eldritch Exorcist
110569.description:
There isn't just a grain of truth behind superstition. It's a boulder of truth, and it's about to roll onto the world.

Humanity has forgotten the ancient ways of magic, ritual, and the occult, as mana has disappeared from the world over the past millennia. Once-powerful creatures are now remembered as silly cryptids. Organizations that, in ancient times, guided the world of mortals from the shadows have now turned into conspiracy theories, and powerful rituals and ancient gods have become nothing more than superstition and old beliefs.

But the universe never stays constant, and change is inevitable. Magic begins to make its return, as mythical creatures start to crawl out from their hidden lairs, the Ouija boards start summoning real demons, and college Halloween haunted-house parties turn into real horrors. The world slowly descends into chaos.

But all of this isn't bad news for everyone. This is a breath of fresh air to Samuel, the last remaining member of a once-infamous wizard family known for their strange deals with Eldritch gods. Following in his ancestors' footsteps, he embarks on a path to the pinnacle of magic and dark arts. The chaos will transform his work as an exorcist from explaining to old ladies that their cat vomiting on the carpet is not a sign of possession to fighting some proper ghosts and demons.

The exorcist business is about to boom, but is this a good thing for the rest of the world?

What to expect:

- Slow descent of society into chaos

- An extensive magic system based on knowledge, occult, and ritual

- Paranormal investigations

- Competent and morally grey protagonist

- Lovecraftian abomination here and there

- Horror and mystery elements

- The litRPG elements as part of the world rather than a system

- Regular updates on Mondays, Wednesdays, and Fridays

- No harem

115512.title: Twice Reborn Transmigrator
115512.description:
S-Rank hunter Brandon Norwood is no stranger to transmigration and traveling between realms. He experienced it himself, having died once before and ending up on Earth. However, even he is surprised when he wakes up and sees his mother.


His mother from his previous life.


Brandon realizes that he returned to his home realm of Lumina, a land of magic and monsters. After taking up his previous identity as Gabriel Sturm once more, he must navigate a world both strange and familiar to him in unexpected ways. In the midst of this, he deals with the problems that plagued him in his first life, including the one that led to his death.


However, Gabriel soon discovers that a greater threat looms on the horizon, one that threatens to destroy everything he holds dear.

(Fair warning for fans of the old TRT, this version will be a lot different. Keep that in mind going forward.)

***

New chapters released on Tuesdays, Thursday, and Saturdays

Cover art by CREADFECTUS

119781.title: Power of 6: bloodline wars
119781.description:
“Let him be born in darkness. Let him never know the light…”

A child born of betrayal.
A queen consumed by revenge.
A kingdom on the brink of collapse.

Queen Eya once loved King George with all her heart, until she discovered the truth: an affair, a secret son, and a future that would erase her legacy. Blinded by heartbreak and whispers of prophecy, queen Eya makes a choice that shatters the six kingdoms as we know it.

As shadows awaken and bloodlines fracture, old gods stir, dark magic spreads, and alliances crumble. But prophecy speaks of a child who will either unite the six worlds… or burn them all asunder.

Lies. Power. Legacy.
In this war of bloodlines, trust no one.
Not even yourself.

Editor- Nicole l.m. McCracken

📅 New chapters every Monday/Wed/Friday!

116829.title: Ideworld Chronicles: Alexa May
116829.description:
Alexa’s parents died when she was young, leaving her orphaned — but her exceptional talent for sleight of hand and passion for art soon caught the attention of a notorious crime lord. Over a decade later, she’s become a daredevil thief, one who would sooner force reality to bend itself to her will rather than accept defeat.

Her life of crime places her in the crosshairs of someone who can kill with a single touch, but it’s her love of art that offers her a lifeline — the Domain of Artistic Creation: a magic entirely her own, governed by strict rules yet limited only by the bounds of her imagination.

As power shifts, both friends and allies are put to the test. The lines begin to blur and Alexa will need to figure out who her real enemies are.

Come watch Alexa battle literal demons — and those who merely feign at such titles.

This story weaves horror, adventure, whimsy, comedy, and tragedy, because life is never just one thing. And for Alexa, life can be anything she can dream up, if she can survive.

DISCLAIMER:

I’m a firm believer that each of us carries more than one voice within — and Alexandra May, the protagonist of this story, embodies that belief.

Her brutal upbringing shaped a voice that’s sharp, concise, and ruthlessly pragmatic — focused only on facts and the unvarnished truth of a situation. There’s no room for embellishment, and no patience for interpretation.

But there’s another side to her: a quirky, introspective artist who sees beauty beneath the surface and drifts into moments of poetic reverie. This voice speaks in imagery and emotion, often getting lost in the wonder of the world.

These two voices interweave — sometimes unexpectedly — creating even more nuanced perspectives. During a chase, a glint of light might catch her eye, awakening her artistic sensibility. Or in a moment of quiet contemplation, danger may strike, and her hardened instincts will snap to the forefront. This blending is intentional. At times, it may feel dissonant — even jarring — but it’s a conscious narrative choice that reflects something I deeply believe: we are layered beings. We oscillate between reflection and action, between stillness and urgency. We wear one face for our friends, and another for our enemies.

Sometimes, a scene asks for more than just observation — and Alexa responds with quirky commentary or an abstract artistic lens. Other times, the moment demands speed, blunt reaction, or raw instinct, leaving no space for elaboration.

That complexity — of how we see the world, and how it responds to us — is at the heart of this story. And its beating is its strength.

Readers can expect a character-focused drama with strong slice-of-life elements: friendships, university life, social events, and everyday challenges woven into Alexa’s journey. There is slow power progression, but plenty of experimentation and creative “crafting” thanks to the nature of her art-based magic. You’ll find comedic moments, tragic turns, learning and training (both in and out of class), and deep worldbuilding revealed gradually, without heavy info-dumps. You’ll discover the secrets of this world right alongside Alexa.

This story will be very long, most of the chapters will be long as well.

Genre & Themes:

Urban/Progression fantasy hybrid with strong magical systems

Clear progression system based on upgrading the soul core

Art-based magic and creative combat

Found family, identity, and self-discovery

Emotional character arcs & personal stakes

Intricate worldbuilding and alternate dimensions

Lots of art-related crafting.

What Not to Expect:

An overpowered main character

A full stats-based system or number crunching (though there will be elements that might scratch that itch later on)

A harem - Although Alexa will be pursued by various potential love interests, she will not engage in casual sexual encounters. Not her style.

Rapid or overly fast progression

Having all the answers straight away / Big info-dumps

UPDATES:

New chapters on: Monay/Wednesday/Friday

Side stories: unscheduled

Read Ahead on Patreon!


Want to stay at least five chapters ahead in Ideworld Chronicles? Support the story and get exclusive early access over on Patreon:
 patreon.com/IdeworldChronicles

Every bit of support helps keep the story alive — and lets you dive deeper into Alexa May’s chaotic, magical world before anyone else.

124592.title: When Silver Burned: A Hidden Progression Fantasy
124592.description:
"There'll be no place to grant you refuge. No gloves will soften the blows the Republic is going to rain down on you and those you love. Not even the last crumbs of justice will stay reserved for your kind." His smile was adorned by blood seeping through the cracks of his teeth. "Long before this is over, you will have embraced misery."

Kalsin stared down at the dying man. "You're probably right. You were before, you know. When you told me about the Republic tearing itself apart if a cure was found. If people caught word, if they discovered some power with the ability to cleanse the Scarrd, it would start a war so large and so monstrous in its destruction, the heavens themselves would weep for the next thousand years to come." 

Kalsin leaned closer to the collector, whispering. "Only... I do not care. I'll find a cure for myself so I can be finally reunited with my sister. I'll find the cure for Jack, because she deserves it more than any dirt I've ever met in this cursed world. And to do it, I'll trudge through waist-deep paste of the collective rotting corpses of both the guilty and the innocent."

~~~

The cruel hand of life made Kalsin a bitter and cynical man. First, it was his silver eyes that marked him different than the rest, and then came his inability to surge. An outcast among outcasts, he had every reason to give up. But he didn’t. And now, chasing the trail of a legend, he will claw his way up from Scarrd to Clenn, one bloodied rung at a time.

In the tumultuous year of 785, the Veiled are invading on the eastern front. Mythos and monsters ravage the countryside. Blindlight rises at the end of each month, searing the eyes of those reckless enough to stare into its radiance.

In the glorious year of 785, within the archipelago of The Ember Republic—a savior of the downtrodden will rise. Whether he wants it or not.

~~~

◆ Hidden/mystery progression fantasy: An MC completely outside of the world's established power system. He has his own secret progression... and he ascends exactly three times in this novel to gain a new aspect of his powers—even if he doesn't know it. I wonder who'll be able to point and go, 'wait a moment, I think I see what's happening!' :)

(SPOILER: He's using his power from Chapter 1)

◆ An MC who's on the backfoot and more reliant on smarts and well-laid plans rather than brute force

◆ Slow burn harem—it's not the #1 focus of the story like most harem novels, but more relevant than something like Wheel of Time

◆ Elements of the "chosen one" trope

◆ Complex and realistic characters

◆ Book 1 is already close to being finished with a backlog of about 100k words

RELEASE DAYS:

1 Chapter every day until the end of Act 1 (Chapter 22). Monday / Friday from that point forward.

94367.title: Moving Up in the World
94367.description:
Across the Empire, individuals with strange clothing and possessions appear.

Whenever found, by order of the Council of Five, they are put to death.

Lost in a strange world where his very existence is illegal, Oliver evades detection by city guardsmen, becoming entangled in the machinations of aristocrats.

In his scramble for answers, Oliver carefully climbs the ladder of social hierarchy. He is not the only one here from another world; discovery would mean more than his own death.

What to expect:
- Undercover Isekai / Portal Fantasy.
- Magic and progression.
- Slow-burn social climb.
- Political intrigue and conspiracy.

Releases Sundays @ ~6pm AWST

Cover Art By (TikTok) Kasuto__ (YouTube) Kasuto_yt

105414.title: A Pioneer's Blood
105414.description:
“A Pioneer’s Blood Waters the Tree of Civilization”

 

The Galaxy has finally learned peace. The Akaadi Imperium and Libera Coalition have put down their blasters for now, turning to the Frontier to replenish their resources. They'll need Pioneers. Dropped into remote, inhospitable worlds, Pioneers must hunt for useful salvage. Valuable materials, lost technologies, and unique lifeforms are all pursued, at grave peril.

Enter Daniel Hardgrave. The old man who raised Hardgrave always told him, "Do what you want, Danny, but never become a Pioneer. Life's short enough as is. Don't become expendable". Hardgrave had listened, scratching out a living as a humble fry cook. Right up until he learned he had a little sister to take care of. Wanting to fund her education and give her a better life, he enlisted as a Pioneer. Unknowingly throwing himself into the maw of the Apocalypse. Old powers are gathering, threatening everything Hardgrave has ever known. For an ex-fry cook trying to provide for a genius little sister and cynical cat, it's an impossible threat. But his discovery of an ancient technology could change all of that…

 

Inspired by series like Warhammer 40K and videogames like Helldivers 2 and Lethal Company, this is a tale of a man who faces danger where others will not go.

 

What to expect:

 

Pulse pounding action in exotic environments.

LitRPG-like progression, with a sci-fi twist.

Minor romance and comedic elements.

80208.title: SHADE: The Passing
80208.description: For centuries, King Isaac fought to protect the homeworlds from an evil that ravaged the galaxies. But now that he is dead, all eyes are searching for the one who inherited the King's gift--The Passing. The question is... who will find him first?

118844.title: Charles the God, Book 1: Apotheosis
118844.description:
When Charles is offered the chance at godhood, he doesn’t realize the price: shaping a fledgling civilization from mere survival to greatness, all while balancing divine justice with mortal flaws. His chosen people, the Squim—squirrel-like survivors in a world of predators—look to him for miracles, commandments, and hope.

But Charles isn’t alone. Dozens of rival gods watch, and every decision shapes a future he can barely imagine. From forging tools and building temples to leading the Squim in battle and faith, Charles must guide them through the Age of Sparks until the Age of Formation dawns.

Told through the eyes of a sassy AI guide and Charles’ devoted follower, Chitterchat, Charles the God is a civilization-building LitRPG that asks what it means to be a god—and what it means to be worthy of worship.

Posts M, W, Fr: 8-10 AM ET

94582.title: Sunspot [Magical Girl Mutations]
94582.description:
Change hurts. Hurt changes.

Seven years ago, the Frozen Flame brought magic to Earth—but not to Dalton, who received only scars. Now a lonely shut-in, “Ezzen” has resigned himself to an online life of secondhand magic, dabbling in magitech engineering and fanboying over the Spire and its superhuman Vaetna, the paragons of this new era.

So when fate splinters and magic finds him, it’s the best day of his life—and the worst, as he suddenly becomes a resource in the cold war over control of magical power. From paramilitary organizations to Flame-worshipping cults to incandescent magical girls, the forces of the world sense the ripples and close in.

Worse, his escape exposes the awful secret of the Flame, the thing quietly omitted from all the theory: that instead of the apotheosis he’s dreamt of, the reality of being a flamebearer is cruel and twisted, the bloody path of monsters. And some of those monsters are frighteningly similar to the Vaetna he idolizes.

What to expect:
- Genres: Sysapoc without a system, magic engineering, realistic superheroes/magical girls, hurt/comfort, yuri
- Inspired by Katalepsis and bits of The Wandering Inn. Frequently compared to Bioshifter though I haven't read it.
- Urban fantasy setting on an Earth that recently gained magic
- Slow-burn character/relationship driven (in between apocalyptic magical disasters)
- Glyph-based magic system & body horror blood magic
- Girlcreature secondary cast, including hyenagirls, androidgirls, dragongirls, mechgirls, buggirls? and more! (not harem)
- Weak-to-strong and timid-to-brave protagonist

General content warnings:
- Visceral transgender themes (dysphoria, transmisogyny)
- Gore (violent & medical)
- Kidnapping
- Some NSFW
Additional CWs will be listed at the top of chapters.

Sunspot also has its own website with a glossary, official art, FAQ, and all the public+advance chapters.

Never stubbing.

121547.title: Nightmares Paradise [LITRPG System Integration]
121547.description:
Jon thought that his life could not get any worse, being kicked out the day after his highschool graduation.

Jon had always planned for his life to take a certain course, not once expecting to be pulled into something much larger than himself. An anomalous existence known as the System selecting Jon as one of the participants for an event known as the System Introduction. 

The opportunity to become something more than just an ordinary university graduate stood before Jon. The chance to shed the restraints of his own Mortality, and walk a Path that most could only ever dream of having. 

"Greatness stands before you. What shall become of you?"

Schedule: Mon - Sun (7 chapters per week) 

The book cover is a placeholder until I can find the money to hire someone to draw something for me. If you have any recommendations please feel free to comment.

119724.title: Build. Fight. Survive. [A Crafting/Factory builder Litrpg]
119724.description:
CelestOS: Thank you for choosing Celestitech, where your survival is our third highest priority!

Ethan Cross wasn't supposed to be on this mission. He snuck aboard the doomed vessel, desperate to find his fiancée, Maria, only to crash-land on an uncharted alien world. Now he's got nothing but a basic omni-tool, a shredded suit, and the sarcastic company AI, CelestOS 4.2, whispering performance evaluations in his ear.

The official mission was simple: find the Veslayan research team, the one Maria was on, and recover valuable data. But the environment is hostile, the wildlife is worse, and the remnants of something ancient, and dangerous, ripple beneath the surface.

To survive, Ethan must rebuild from scrap, fight evolving alien threats, and uncover the truth behind the mission that was never meant to succeed. With every base he constructs and every battle he wins, he inches closer to finding Maria— the only reason he risked everything, and the only thing that still matters now.

Time is running out. Resources are scarce. And something  is watching.

Build. Fight. Survive.

-Inspired by Factorio, Deadspace, Mass Effect

-Litrpg (Skills, and tech-tree based)

-Progression Sci-fi

-Crafting

-Factory building

-Tower defense

updates m-f starting June 11th.


Read 11+ chapters ahead on Patreon (updates six times a week)

58522.title: Olimpia
58522.description:
I am a scout.

An elven scout of the 15th Legion of the Republic. Not the most notable legion these days, but its history and service are unquestionable, and I serve it with pride and dedication. I venture into the uncharted northern lands, often alone, and find the threats before they can damage the realm.

An uncommon rank for an elf to reach after their compulsory service, but it is the same position my father earned. And his father before him. My mother was no slouch either, as she proved herself by joining the archer cohort.

And now I'm heading out into the Northern Forest in search of the expected beastkin hoard entering our lands. The latest occurrence of an endless struggle. It is dangerous, but somebody has to do it, and I am proud to fulfill my duty. All for the sake of the Republic.

A Republic that hates me. Throw a stone, and it will land next to a human willing to ridicule me and my family for existing, no matter how often we prove ourselves. Why do I serve them with such loyalty? Why...

I am a scout of the Republic. I perform my duty with honor and dedication. I will stand until I am relieved.

104261.title: Bookbound Bunny
104261.description:
"Books contain countless wonders."

Arakil, once a god of magic, found himself at odds with other deities. Imprisoned within his grimoire, he had to wait until the perfect person came along.

That person was a bunny girl named Lily. An orphan with a frail body that ruined her chances of being an adventurer. But, she had a talent for penmanship and a thirst for knowledge - the perfect foundation for a mage apprentice.

Seeing the opportunity to train a new pupil eager to improve their life, and sensing a chance to work towards his own freedom, Arakil teams up with Lily to foster her magical abilities.

Updates: Tuesday, Thursday, Saturday. 08:15 GMT+2

123226.title: Runes of Might
123226.description:
One curse. One raven. One collapsing world.
All balanced on the soul of a boy who should have died.

Eirik Styrkarsson wasn’t born a hero. He was the runt who hid while a horror butchered his kin—and awoke cursed.
Amber runes mark his swelling strength.
Azure runes track his fracturing mind.
Both double at midnight, dragging him toward godhood with every setting sun.

But power is a prison.
Love is a death sentence.

102060.title: Unseen Cultivator
102060.description:
Long ago, the old world crumbled before the destructive fury of the demon plague. Demonic cultivators betrayed the Dao and cast down once mighty sects, leaving only ruined wastelands behind. The few survivors took refuge in hidden lands, pocket spaces created by distortions of spatial dao. There, in secret, they strove to regain the strength necessary to reclaim the world from its terrible new masters. Now, twenty-five hundred years later, the vagaries of the infinite may have finally delivered hope at last.

Qing Liao never dreamed of being a cultivator, but when mandatory testing discovers his potential, he becomes part of the Celestial Origin Sect. As he trains to wield the mighty power of stellar qi, he learns that he possesses an unusual quirk that puts him at the center of the war between the demonic and the orthodox. Now the trapper's son must navigate waters far deeper than he ever imagined and struggle to stay alive long enough to claim a destiny he never expected.

Grand Elder Itinay has schemed for two and a half millennia, waiting for the day when opportunity will arise. Finding it at last, she will stop at nothing to forge it into the tool she needs to achieve victory over her ancient enemies. Yet even she may balk at the full scope of the sacrifices she must make to shatter the status quo. 

Scoria Scorn, once a cultivator of no consequence, chose the demons over humanity and never looked back. Now, seeking to claim the eternal dominion she sees as hers by right, she will hunt down and destroy all remaining fragments of human existence, one by one, until ultimate power rests in her hands. A careful follower of the plague's deeply hidden true nature, her path is set to lead right to the door of the Celestial Origin Sect.

As immortals collide, one cultivator waits unseen, an arrow cloaked in shadow.

Unseen Cultivator is a Xianxia tale with slight but significant twists to classic tropes set in a post-apocalyptic setting. This story will be told in seven novel-length volumes, for a total of ~750,000 words. Volumes 1&2 are complete and posted. Volume 3 is currently posting. Volume 4 is being written. The intended goal is to complete the story release sometime in the second half of 2026.

Updates Mon-Wed-Fri

89836.title: Learning to Fall
89836.description:
Dragons and dragonettes ride the winds, making their home in the sky islands that float high above a world spanning ocean. Some live in the safety of cities, working in a medieval society with tens or hundreds of thousands of their fellows. But many choose to leave for a life among frontier keeps, supplying the cities and securing the kingdom's territory against outside threats.

Aytin Luffin was born in one of these keeps. The fourth child of a minor noble, he's never been in line to inherit the family title. But he still has responsibilities to his family. That's how he found himself as a passenger on a dragon, bound for the capital city of the kingdom.

No journey is safe. Corrupted darklings stalk the night. Dangerous beasts roam the wilds. Storms can blow an unwary dragon out of the sky. And brigands prey on anyone unlucky enough to run across them.

This crew has made the trip countless times. They're faced all of these dangers and more. And there's no reason to believe that this trip will be any different.

Learning to Fall is an action-adventure fantasy through and through. Expect excitement, complex characters, self-discovery, heroics, painful lows, incredible highs, and maybe even some romance. Chapters average around 3k words, and will be posted weekly every other week due to life throwing stuff my way.

This is a cannon story in the Hunter or Huntress universe. However, reading the source material is not required and Learning to Fall is a self-contained, standalone story.

Cover art by the extremely talented Harmaa.

If you're interested in hanging out or discussing the story, head on over to the main Hunter or Huntress discord!

80247.title: Somewhere Someplace
80247.description:
~Basically a slow-burning 'magical' sci-fi within an isekai-esque fantasy setting*~

An operation failed. An ambush by unknowns. An ancient trooper, now an enigmatic foreigner stranded somewhere someplace. Rescued by a deserter, someone similar yet distinct, who vanished without a trace. Abandoned yet again, the foreigner must survive alone within this land of adventure and fantasy made real, blending in… to a point, while being hunted… nominally. A virus in a system. Alien among aliens. Masks worn as faces, devoid of identity. A mind decayed by time. A purpose long lost.

Gods scheme upon rotting thrones, shackled to wills not their own. Great powers feast upon their world, stomachs never satiated. Underneath, a graveyard sleeps while primordials conjure air to breathe. The world’s grand play motions forward, yet its evolving stage remains contrived.

Meaningless happenings, granted meaning. People found, turned to characters. Memories, turned to story. Events in observation, narrativized. The play’s stage being set for a narrative dance between the protagonist designated and it which watches, with ever meddling interest.

Release schedule:  During regular volumes: Every Monday and Friday by ~5:15 pm PST (Pacific Standard Time). During inter-volume gaps ('interims'): most Wednesdays by ~5:15 pm PST, but may be susceptible to variability.

Copyright © 2025 Nemo Omniaque. All rights reserved.

124134.title: NPC for Hire-[Gamelit|Simulation|Multi-genre]
124134.description:
Looking for a GameLit trilogy that blends sci-fi, cyberpunk, fantasy, and stat-driven characters? Dive into a sharp, funny take on AI, the Singularity, and the fractured future of simulated worlds. Log in—and welcome to the SynthNet.

The SynthNet is a galaxy-spanning simulation where every sector plays by its own rules. One moment you’re dodging fireballs in high-fantasy ruins, the next you're hacking elevators in a skyscraper-sized financial district—or fighting for your life in a sun-scorched desertpunk outpost. For Fen, a veteran NPC whose job is to hand out tutorial quests and never question the code, it’s usually just another day at work.

Until he’s reassigned to a forgotten, bug-ridden sector barely holding together. The loop is dull. The players are weird. And then a glitch hits mid-mission—and a player dies. Permanently.

Suddenly, Fen finds himself hunted by rogue AIs, corporate enforcers, and players who know far too much. Teaming up with a sarcastic AI named Auri, a sharp-tongued freelancer, and a crew of NPCs and outcasts, he’s dragged into a hidden war to save not one, but two universes.

Because this isn’t just a game anymore—it never was.

The simulation is fracturing. Memories long buried are rebooting. And the digital overseers pulling the strings are hiding something far worse than corrupted code.

Fen was built to follow orders.
If he wants to survive—or matter—he’ll have to break them.

NPC for Hire is a fast-paced, genre-hopping GameLit adventure packed with bad puns, pop culture riffs, deadpan dad jokes, and emotional gut-punches. This is Book One of a trilogy that will take you from cyberpunk to sword-and-sorcery, from undead wastelands to space opera and beyond.

New chapters post every Friday, with bonus drops unlocked by reader milestones. I’ll be working with readers to help shape future zones, threats, and twists—so if you’ve ever wanted to help design the next world in a simulation gone wrong… this is your chance.

Sign in. Gear up. Let’s break the loop and level up together.
– S.C. Culligan
Writing for readers who love clever worlds, emotional weight, and a little chaos in their code.

123321.title: The Ethersmith [Rewrite - Runesmithing, Book 2 Fully Written]
123321.description:
The art of runesmithing died long ago. Once legendary runeswords have been reduced to mere decorations, their powers made irrelevant by the discovery of ethereal spirits. Techniques were forgotten, and any remaining runesmiths were ridiculed and shunned.

Vivian is one such runesmith. Born as an orphan and adopted into a smithy, she and her adoptive grandpa persist with a dream. They wish to prove that runeswords are once again worthy of fighting monsters in the lands below.

What Vivian never expected was for herself to be the one fighting. Alone in the underground with a crazed spirit that seeks to profit and grow from every monster in their wake. Below the earth awaits a subterranean labyrinth of monsters and demons, where ethereal storms ensure nothing stays dead for long…

This is a rewrite of the Ethersmith. Chapters 1-44 are lightly edited. After chapter 45, the story has been completely rewritten from the ground up.

94872.title: The Augment's Code (A Superhero LitRPG)
94872.description:
We called it the Augmentation Array. 

At first, we didn’t know what it would do; it just appeared in the sky one day, wrapped around the entire planet. But when normal people started showing up with superpowers, we could all make the connection.

In the ten years since it appeared, I had managed to steer clear of the Augments as they fought for control over the world, and the world as a whole just seemed to get used to their never ending battles. What none of us could know, could really guess, is that there was so much more to them than we even realized.

After stumbling into the middle of a fight between two of the strongest Augments on the planet, I found myself waking up into a world I never could have imagined. Because the truth was, every single Augment on the planet was participating in a game called Infinite Ascension. And it wasn’t long before I found myself waist deep in leaderboards, bikers, and an A.I. that I’m positive is trying to get me killed. 

Regular Schedule: Mon-Wed-Fri

Expect a mixture of campy super hero and crude humor within a modern day setting. Gradual leveling with a lot of achievements, loot boxes, and a sassy A.I that might want to sleep with Nate's best friend.

Come on over to my Discord to talk about the story, see advanced news, and just talk nonsense! 
https://discord.gg/4sSUCQewa3

117611.title: Reincarnation Gone Wrong
117611.description:
Yuki Died. Her Killer? An inter-dimensional Serial Killer.

Now she's been reincarnated, but after a few slightly bad assumptions during character creation, she's ended up as a rabbit in a dark fantasy world.

Our intrepid heroine must brave mountains of fluff and the machinations of an old adversary if she's to live out the magic filled adventure of her dreams! Can she overcome the meddling of the church or the siren's call of ear-scritches long enough to find out what's going on with this busted system?

Find all this and more in Reincarnation Gone Wrong!

Discord server, if anyone wants to ask questions, hang out, or make suggestions: https://discord.gg/pne3CaCUrX

100758.title: AWAKENING - the adventure
100758.description:
Henry Dreherg is a young boy who leaves his mother’s house to pursue what every young boy dreams of, an adventure.

AWAKENING – THE ADVENTURE: ACT I – THE AWAKENING BEGINS

In a fractured world of empires, awakenings, and beasts, a boy’s quiet life ends the moment fate knocks on his door.

Henry Dreherg never asked to become a target. But when a stolen relic of unimaginable power falls into the hands of his friend, the shadows of Transylvanien stir—and a deadly vampire baron named Adelin Dravencourt begins the hunt.

Forced to flee, Henry forms a reluctant alliance with his freshly gained friends. Together, they must survive assassins, uncover buried truths, and face monsters both human and inhuman.

But the evil Adelin is always one step ahead—and he has no intention of letting them reach the dawn.

Old legends awaken. Bonds are forged. Blood is spilled.

The first act of destiny has begun.

AWAKENING – THE ADVENTURE: ACT II – RISE OF SHADOWS

The world is no longer what it once seemed.

After the storm of Transylvanien, Henry Dreherg and his companions find themselves hunted, wounded, and changed. But as one darkness fades, a far deeper one begins to rise.

From the ruins of the Shadow Society, the elusive Schatten Syndicate emerges. Deadlier. Smarter. And they want blood—especially Emilia’s.
Meanwhile, the infamous Soul Reapers—ten legendary warriors who answer to no one—begin to move from the shadows.

While training under the silent Master Kensei, Henry must unlock the secrets of his Heavenly Awakening, while Jack faces the wrath of the Stormdragon within. Friendships deepen. Secrets surface. And enemies watch from just beyond the light.

In a world where power means survival, the question remains:

Who will rise… and who will vanish in the shadows?

66380.title: The Allbright System - A Sci-Fi Progression LitRPG Story
66380.description:
I am not currently publishing this Novel anywhere. Not on Amazon or any other similar website.

If you see this Novel being reposted or resold somewhere, please DM me immediately with a link to the problematic entity. Thank you!


Thea has always dreamt of joining the United Human Federation marine corp, ever since she was saved by one of their marines at a young age in the Undercity of Lumiosia.

Growing up in an undercity meant however, especially in a mid-world such as Lumiosia, that she would have to work her way up from the very bottom. She would need to leave for one of the inner or core worlds, before she had any chance of applying to the UHF marines, but for that, she needed credits.

Having spent a lot of time in the local arcade for many years, she had accumulated a lot of technical knowledge in repairing the old-tech machines, as well as gained a high proficiency in a lot of the simulators and games featured.

Preparing for the monthly reset day, in which the ladders for each game get updated by the local quantum node and prizes are distributed for the top performers, she never would have anticipated a brand new challenge appearing from thin air.

A challenge which changed the path of her life forever...

Current release times: Tuesdays and Fridays at 8pm CEST / 2pm ET / 11am PT

Discord Link: https://discord.gg/rtZGz5RHtq

The Allbright System is an Epic Sci-Fi Progression LitRPG, heavily focused on war and the military complex as a whole. It is my first publicly published Webnovel, so I am very much looking forward to read all of your feedback and suggestions.

As the name suggests, there will be a System that governs the major progression and LitRPG elements of the story.

The main draw of this story will be the way that the System interacts with each faction in the war for the galaxy, as each faction gets a unique system-trait for themselves. The nature of the traits is to be a secret until further on in the story, but rest assured that they fundamentally change the way that war in this galaxy is waged.

Before you start reading this story, please be aware that this will not be a short one.

I prefer long, expansive stories that span thousands of pages, in order to fully tell the story I intend to tell.

The Prologue Arc itself, which culminates in the System integration, will be 21 Chapters long (around 300-350~ pages on RR), so if you are looking for a quick and short read, this story will not be for you.

For everyone else, I hope you will enjoy this length journey alongside me. I plan to give readers the option to choose on developments for the story or characters at later stages, where it makes sense, so please look forward to the reader polls at those times.

A major inspiration for this Webnovel is Duck_No_Duck's "Digital Marine", which unfortunately has been on a lengthy hiatus.

Further inspirations (more minor in scope, mostly regarding the litRPG and System elements) include, but aren't limited to, Azarinth Healer by Rhaegar and Beneath the Dragoneye Moons by Selkie.

Highly recommend you check them all out, if you're enjoying this story!

79156.title: Tallah [Book 3 Complete]
79156.description:
Tallah means to end an eternal empire and take the head of an empress. Her enemy is nigh immortal and wields power only few really understand. To take her down, Tallah's going to need power of her own. Lots of it. But time is not a friend, not when a mistake has brought the empire's attack hounds onto her scent.

Sil is stuck between a past she can't think on, and a future that will likely have her swinging on the end of a short rope... if lucky. Having escaped the empire's dungeons once, she has no other choice but to follow her friend on the warpath in the vain hope for a calm life beyond the mission.

Vergil should be dead. Twice even! Given a second lease on life on an alien world, he finds himself in thrall to an obviously insane sorceress and her equally terrifying partner, with the ghost of a dwarven hero sharing his headspace with a nearly useless AI companion. His rescue by the terrible duo may not be the stroke of luck he was hoping for. Dragged along by forces he can't conceive, he can only hope to find a clue as to why he's been brought to a place as horrible as Edana.

--------------------------------------

What to expect:

- Competent, highly-motivated MCs pursuing their own agendas on both sides;

- A mysterious world that may not be what it seems on first glance;

- Gods and their games, bloody battles and body horror;

- More magic than you can shake a wand at;

- Strategic soul theft.

--------------------------------------

Release schedule: Monday, Friday, 15:30 GMT

Average chapter length: 2000 - 3000 words

Feel free to reach me on Discord for any questions or just to say hi.

74881.title: The Protagonist's Sister Is Actually The Strongest: An Action-Packed LitRPG Transmigration And Progression Fantasy
74881.description:
Have you ever read a novel with such a terrible ending that you wished you could change the story and give the characters you loved the happy ending they deserved?

I was just another failure of an author, writing stories nobody read, and that never sold. Seeking to improve my writing, I read the most popular novel at that time, Solo Player, to learn what made it so popular. However, as I read this story, I couldn’t help but feel frustrated about the story’s development, which had a terrible ending.

Eventually, and quite bitterly, once I ended reading the book, I found myself transmigrated into the very world of this novel. Did I become the Protagonist? A Villain? Or perhaps even an Extra? No, it was much worse than I imagined. Because I ended up becoming the most worthless character that nobody ever cared about in the novel. A character that is often considered the motivation for the protagonist to grow stronger, but also his greatest burden.

Someone every reader hated!

“I’m the protagonist’s sister…”

However, with my knowledge of this novel's events, my worthlessness was about to change. I’ve decided to not only become the strongest but also change the story’s terrible ending!

“I won’t let you go inside a Dungeon, it’s too dangerous.”

...As long as I can get this incredibly corny and overprotective brother out of my way!

And for some reason, the Constellations won’t stop bothering me.

[The Cosmic Throne {Butterfly That Flies Across The Universe} seems interested in your tenacity!]

[She has sponsored 1000000 Plot Points and the [Demon of Calamity Transformation Technique (SS)] Skill!]

[The Cosmic Throne {Monkey that Dances in Chaos} finds your chaotic nature amusing!]

[He has thrown the [Umbral Chaos Stone Necklace (S Rank)] at you!]

[Not enough? He launched the [Immortal Heaven Peach (SSS Rank)] right on your face!]

There was something really wrong with the Constellations this time around.

[The Cosmic Throne {Jester Filled With Lies} is happy that you’re bringing despair to your victims!]

[He has gifted you the [Jester’s Last Laugh (S Rank Privilege)] and the [Master of Manipulation (SS)] Skill!]

[The Cosmic Throne {Maiden that Watches Over Nature} seems happy you’re growing stronger.]

[She has gracefully sponsored you with 2000000 Plot Points and Fully Heals All Your Wounds!]

[She has also begun to wonder if you could plant some trees for her, gifting you the [Divine World Tree Seedling (SSS Rank)]!]

[The Cosmic Throne {Warrior That Seeks Calamity} is satisfied with your battle performance but asks for more battle!]

[He has sponsored you with 500000 Plot Points and [Beheading Sword of Destruction (SSS Rank)]!]

They simply couldn’t stop gifting me things as if I were some sort of famous streamer for them.

“I am grateful, but please just leave me alone already…”

What to Expect:
- Fast-paced Action and LitRPG Progression, System, Monster Taming, Skill Copy and Fusion, Crafting, with Dungeon and Other Worlds Exploration. 
- Constellations based on all sorts of both Historical and Mythological figures.  
- A colorful cast of side characters full of life, the original Protagonist changes and becomes a better person. 
- A smart MC that abuses her knowledge of the story to become REALLY OP.
- A story that doesn't go by the script, the butterfly effect the character creates affects the story and doesn't leave it as it was supposed to be, unlike many other similar stories. 
- 3 ~ 7 Chapters a week, almost daily updates until I can't. 1800 ~ 3000+ Words per chapter, usually. 

Note: This is a Novel Inspired by seveal similar stories, such as Solo Leveling, Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint, The Novel's Extra, and so on. It is mostly my own take, with many differences but that is clearly inspired. Solo Player as a novel does NOT exist, it is of my own creation within this fictional universe, and this novel is NOT a fanfic.  

My Grammar is not the best, and I am not a native english speaker, so I'm doing my best to improve. I would appreciate anybody pointing out the mistakes. 

Copyright © 2023 PancakesWitch. All rights reserved. No part of this work may be reproduced or used in any manner without the prior written permission of the copyright owner, except for the use of brief quotations in a review.

This novel is also being posted on Scribblehub and Webnovel (for free). If you see it anywhere else, please let me know. Thank you.

101318.title: WARGAMES! (Action, LitRPG, Dark Comedy)
101318.description:
World peace was mankind's biggest mistake.

United under one banner, humanity erased war, hunger, and disease. A utopia of peace, compassion, and cooperation.

Then the stars took notice.

The Intersol called us forward, claiming we’d earned a place amongst them. But their judgment was swift—our kindness was weakness, our mercy a joke. Too soft. Too fragile. Too naive to stand among real civilizations.

Earth was declared a game reserve, a zoo where we could live out our little fantasy of peace. The price of safety? Biomass harvesting—our people taken as food for the cosmos.

But there is an escape clause. Wargames. A brutal bloodsport where species prove their worth—or are eradicated. A hundred thousand humans thrown into a meat grinder against billions. A species that abandoned war, fighting civilizations that never stopped.

The aliens think they’ve already won.

But they never studied our history.

They don’t know about our fallen blood-soaked empires, the instinct for cruelty, the hunger for dominance lurking beneath our progress.

Humanity hasn’t forgotten war.

We’ve just been waiting for an excuse.

119019.title: The Skybound Trilogy
119019.description:
The world didn’t burn...it whistled itself to death.

In the aftermath of Tesla’s final invention, Harmonics became humanity’s new wonder and enemy. The marvel of free electricity gave way to madness. The skies went to those who fled, the ground to those who couldn’t.

Above the poisoned clouds, sky-bound nations drift on giant dirigibles, locked in a Cold War about to go hot. Below, silence is either worship or extinction.

Fifteen-year-old Maximilian Fuchs is freshly graduated and headed for his first combat posting aboard Berlin-Luft-22—a greenhorn pilot in one of the ‘Luftkinder’ Squadrons.
He’s trained to fight, fly, and survive the harmonics that steal a man’s sanity. But war is brewing in the stratosphere—and whispers from the Warsaw spire may change the balance forever and push the world over the edge, further away from surviving the hellscape that humanity built itself.

When the Harmonics shift, the world listens, sometimes whispering back.

Skybound Ashes is part of the Royal Road Community Magazine contest.

[Pacing & Genre Advisory]

The Skybound Trilogy is a slow descent into a ‘what-if’ world on the cusp of war.
We follow our protagonist through a reality unhinged, rationalized only by the necessity of survival.
Humanity teeters on the edge of extinction… And still, they play the same game they always have: war.

The Skybound Trilogy isn’t about easy answers or flashy wins. It’s about what happens between the fighting: the waiting, the protocol, the paperwork, and the quiet moments where a kid wonders if they’ll make it home with their mind intact.

You'll feel right at home if you’re a fan of The Naked and the Dead, All Quiet on the Western Front, Girls’ Last Tour, or Iron Widow.

Expect:

Teenage Soldiers

Found Family in a System That Eats You 

Procedural Dread 

Dieselpunk Horror

Slow burn pace

What-if Scenario 

Bureaucracy at the End of the World 

No Stats. No Systems. Just Survival. 

Themes include:
Militarization of adolescence, state-sponsored forgetting, the weight of small decisions, the erosion of myth, the human cost of technological ambition, and humanity’s stubbornness-or stupidity-in choosing war again and again.

[First Action Skip Ahead]
Tense flight prep: Chapter 4
First Blood: Chapter 5

[for the world builders]
How it came to be: Prologue I 
The state of the world when we begin our story: Prologue II

[Planned Length:] ~ 3 arc trilogy (Book 1 completed, Book 2 and 3 upcoming)
[Release Speed:] ~ twice a week (Wed & sat)

78737.title: Ad Astra
78737.description:
Astra was born without any talent in cultivation and, being orphaned from a young age, didn't have many other prospects for thriving on the mining colony she called home. After naively buying a mysterious map from a sketchy old man, and being chased by a deranged cultivator for said map, she stumbles upon an opportunity that will change her life, and her fate. Now given the opportunity to grow her cultivation, Astra must find a way to thrive in this brand new world that has opened up to her. 

Join Astra as she begins her cultivation journey, gathers allies and friends, fights against demonic beasts and cultivators alike, and steadily makes her way, to the stars.

119164.title: I Always Get That Feeling of Deja Vu [LitRPG Time Loop with a Twist]
119164.description:
Welcome to Solvane, a city built vertical on three distinct levels. The sunlit heights belong to the oligarchic elite, the smoke-choked depths to the workers who keep the engines burning. In between, unrest brews.

Viktor, a brilliant but overlooked inventor from the middle tier, only wanted to showcase his newest device at the grand Expo. Instead, he finds himself caught in a terrifying terrorist attack led by the enigmatic Valdemar and the shadowy movement, Libra - a rebellion against the ruling class. Moments later, his entire world is reduced to ashes and devoured by living Darkness.

But Viktor doesn't die.

Instead, he finds himself trapped in a time loop, forced to relive the day of the attack until he finds out how to stop the Embodiment of Darkness itself from destroying everything he knows.

The problem? He can't remember anything he did in previous runs.

Armed only with a faint sense of Déjà vu and a mysterious system designed to help him piece together fragments of his previous selves, Viktor must fight to outwit Darkness and unravel the dark secrets of Solvane...or die again, and again...

But with only 123 chances - and a second looper purposefully sabotaging him - can he truly break the cycle and save the world?

Cover is an original art piece made by Federico Cimini.

[Note: This story is a spinoff-sequel to my previous work, Do You Ever Get That Feeling of Déjà Vu?
While it’s written to stand on its own and welcome new readers without confusion, those who've read the original will find deeper connections, returning characters, and enhanced emotional weight throughout. That said, starting here is perfectly fine - but if you want the full experience, I do recommend reading that one first.]

What to expect:

- 5 new chapters a week.

- A LitRPG featuring two distinct systems.

- A steampunk world powered by magitek.

- A character-driven story building up slowly with every chapter revealing more and more.

- A large mystery to unfold.

- A cat-and-mouse game between two intelligent individuals

- A time loop story focusing on a unique system with skills that offer creative ways to retain memories between loops and an MC who must use his wits to progress.

- A weak/average (but smart) to strong to OP character progression.

111416.title: Afterlife 2.0 [Litrpg in Hell]
111416.description:
Tired of the old afterlife? Bored of eternal torment, fire, and brimstone? Well, you’re not alone—apparently, the gods are, too. To shake things up, they’ve scrapped the standard “endless agony for all” and replaced it with something... different. Welcome to Eternia: a brutal, glitch-riddled wilderness where new souls are dumped with little hope of survival. Make it here, or end up back in the classic hell as a consolation prize.

Enter Ellie, who dies just in time to beta-test the gods’ twisted new system. Freshly arrived and utterly unprepared, she’s tossed into a world where everything seems out to kill her—or just glitch out before she can figure out what it’s supposed to do. Ellie quickly realizes that her “next life” is more of a do-or-die nightmare than any kind of second chance. Or at least it would be, if she weren’t a closeted fan of the genre she’s been thrown into.

Armed with nothing but her wits and a reluctant sense of humour, Ellie must navigate the hostile landscape, outwit overly aggressive wildlife, and maybe, just maybe, survive long enough to find some purpose in this cosmic mess. But in a world designed for divine entertainment—and where the rules are still being written—anything could and probably will happen.

Will she conquer the wilds of Eternia, or will she learn that the only thing worse than hell is the constant struggle to escape it? Join Ellie as she stumbles, fights, and glitches her way through eternity’s most chaotic afterlife.

What to expect:

Non-Human Protagonist

Weak to Strong MC with very fast progression early on

Possible Romance, most characters are at least a little bisexual. No Reverse Harem

Magic system exploration (What even is Mana?)

Crafting Focused Main Character

Sociopathic Main Character who still craves connections with people.

No insanely long fight scenes that drag out to the point of boredom

Inspired by works like Primal Hunter, Azarinth Healer, and A Budding Scientist In A Fantasy World

120643.title: Luna
120643.description:
Luna is a Class-D bounty hunter with 200 credits to her name and a ship held together by prayer. When a 75,000 credit emergency bounty appears - Recover First Fleet Historical Data Archive  at an abandoned Eden Colony—she knows it's suicide. Forty-seven dead hunters prove it.

But with her ship Lucky falling apart and nowhere else to turn, Luna and her sarcastic droid companion Chip accept the contract. 

In the lawless frontier of Distance 7, Luna must face dimensional anomalies, alien mysteries, and a predator that's already killed everyone who's tried to claim this bounty.

The real question isn't whether she'll survive.

 Join the Patreon and get early chapters, exclusive updates, and help support more content. 

Our Discord community! Chat with me directly, get sneak peeks and connect with fellow readers

(This book is exclusively on RoyalRoad and Rouzard.com. If you find it anywhere else, it's stolen)

112496.title: Immortality Starts With Face
112496.description:
2025 Writathon Winner!

A third-rate (ahem, professional!) actor from Earth transmigrates into a pampered cultivator's body with a System that grants him power, wealth, skills, and anything else he desires... based on which, and how many, people believe he actually possesses said things. To survive and thrive, he must become the ultimate Actor, bluffing his way up the cultivation ladder one performance at a time.

______________________________________________________________

Lengthy Author's Note: Just like all of my other stories, this story will make use of advanced vocabulary and grammar. You can expect to read PLENTY of descriptions in order to increase immersion: in other words, my goal is for the reader to experience the world first-hand, including what the characters are thinking, feeling, seeing, smelling, tasting... etc.

Some people may call that style of storytelling "wordy."

I call it "high quality writing." 

If you don’t like reading high quality writing with beautiful, descriptive language — then do yourself a favor: put this story down and go watch a Netflix show or something. This story (and maybe reading in general) isn’t something you’ll enjoy. 

To borrow a quote from the great Tite Kubo, which feels quite instructive to the criticism I often receive: 

". . .The thing is, if you have the talent to draw a story that's more interesting than Bleach, then please become a mangaka soon. If it's good, then it'll definitely be more popular than Bleach. If you say that you can't draw, then do your best and become an editor so you can give advice to mangaka. If you really have the ability, then you'll have good reception anywhere you go. If you don't have the talent, nor have the effort, and yet you want to tell me that pathetic little complaint, you're just some guy who's trying to hinder a person who's actually working hard, so close your eyes and hide in your corner, open your mouth only to eat rain and dust and maybe you'll actually live somehow." 

And so, if you decide you have a complaint about my writing, please review the above and know that my own response will be something similar. :)

On a different note: this story has a lot of rare "bonus features," including things like character theme music, which you can find on my Patreon. (Patreon also updates faster!)

120579.title: Blessed - A Dark Arcanepunk LitRPG
120579.description:
Listen up, shitling, because I'm only gonna tell you once. 

You want to go back home? Then grow a spine and pay attention. Danger lurks around every corner, and it doesn’t give a shit that you’re scared. Take it from me.

I escaped a torture chamber, killed my sadistic jailor, and fought the zombified remnants of a forgotten city. Enough to make fate herself cringe, really.

Still, it all pales in comparison to receiving a “blessing” with the slight side effect of my humanity rotting away. But don’t you worry, and hand me that bullet. Working it out is on my to-do-list. Right after burning this place to the ground.

What to expect:

• Dark, mythos and pop culture inspired themes

• Slow start, then fast paced action, and lots of it.

• Skills that grow with the characters. 

• Slowburn progression

• Creepy monsters and lore shrouded in mystery 

First book written. Releasing 5 times a week, M-F.

108114.title: Paragon of Weaponmasters
108114.description:
The social media data of a dead man has been used to recreate his consciousness in a VRMMO.

Luke Walton is now Urul Mulush, an orc NPC in Crossroads Online. Sold a legendary blade, he discovers an entirely new class: the Weaponmaster. With it, he can join the players in their relentless pursuit of levels and loot.

Even with the best equipment in the game, he can’t reach max level without making tough decisions that strain his morals and relationships. The dungeons and dragons are easy pickings compared to the hostile players, and worse still is the rogue artificial intelligence in charge.

A subscription for half a million gold hangs over his head. Unique classes come with the additional challenge of infamy, and none of the benefits of fame. He's going to make it back to his family in the real world, even if it kills him… again.

What to expect:

- Not your typical VRMMO power trip

- Relatable MC

- Consistent pacing no fluff

- Emotional plot with levity

Book 1 complete, Book 2 chapters releasing every Tuesday!

Cover by Duy Phan

Typesetting by Asu

111209.title: Lexia Chronicles: The Myth of Gru Noblemind
111209.description:
Winner – Royal Road April 2025 Writathon Challenge

He doesn’t remember being Gru.
But the Forest does.

It whispers through the vines. Follows him with wolves. Opens doors the Greens still call sacred.

Chen wakes in the forest with no memory—just bruises, dried blood, and a name he doesn't recognize written across strangers' faces. Gru Noblemind. Saint of the Forest. Herald of peace. But the vines remember something else.

They remember the plasma polearm.
The screams in the pyre towns.
The woman he once called partner turning into a silver falcon and slitting his throat.

Chen isn’t a hero. He was someone’s weapon. Kildra’s. And if she wasn’t gone, just dormant—then what does that make him now?

Lexia: The Myth of Gru Noblemind is a myth-tech epic where memory is both gospel and ghost. Where a sentient forest grown from wartime bio-code begins to stir, trying to remember its last operator. And where a man, pulled into a legend he doesn’t believe in, is forced to wear a past that no longer fits—and maybe never did.

The Greens think he’s returned to finish what Gru started.
Gloria and Joya, scavengers from the edges of civilization, think they’ve found a relic of the Golden Age.
But Chen? Chen’s just trying not to kill anyone. Not again.

If you like:

Dune’s quiet power plays,

Destiny’s living ruins and holy tech,

or Stormlight Archive’s burdened heroes and blurry truths—

Then step into the Clearing.
Ask the Forest who you really are.
And pray it doesn’t answer too loudly.

Because the Forest remembers.
The Calder systems are waking.
And the myth of Gru Noblemind is only beginning to rewrite itself.

124227.title: Mimesis
124227.description:
In the endless maze of fractured time, Sumarel wanders—a girl whose soul has shattered into a hundred pieces. Whether it was a chain of fatal decisions or cruel cosmic irony that brought her here no longer matters. Trapped in a temporal loop, she's condemned to relive her nightmare over and over again. But how do you piece together the broken mirror of a soul when every effort only scatters them further?

Save her family, friends, and city. Or sacrifice everything in pursuit of perfection?

A story of seeking wholeness in a magical world where time is fluid, willpower is both curse and blessing, and you walk the razor's edge between salvation and death.

War, plague, intrigue — the world's aflame.

Time holds me between joy and sorrow.

I seek the moon, to show the glimpse of God,

Yet all I see – reflection of a fraud.

Sipping my coffee,

Hiding eyes from the world.

In wretched silence, through ages of turmoil, 

The peace lies still, magnificent demise.

***

Dear Reader,

I hope you won't be put off by the darkness and tragedy of this story, occasionally lightened by Shakespearean contrasts. When reading fiction, I'm naturally drawn to lighter tales focused on adventure and mystery. But I write this story not just for others—first and foremost, it's for myself. It's an attempt to give shape to my personal essays by weaving them into a narrative and breathing life into them. This work explores the intertwining of life's harsher circumstances alongside the rises and falls that sometimes come our way.

Euphonia8

73484.title: The Glass Wizard - The tale of a somewhat depressed wizard
73484.description:
The Glass Wizard World is filled with fantastic peoples, beasts and places. And then there is wizard artefact hunter Yves who doesn’t really enjoy any of it. Follow him and his familiar into wizarding schools and witches’ forests, to the depth of the ocean and back to floating kingdoms. He insists that you don't.

In this first book about the Glass Wizard, Yves and his familiar venture to the Crystalline Trench while trying to evade the Mirror World Stalker.

This slow burn original story updates weekly until Yves dies or the Duckman runs out of coffee. Feel invited to explore the Glass Wizard World on the story's website.

 
What to expect:
▪ An oh so slow burn [sometimes dark and oftentimes psychological] fantasy story with wizards, witches, elves, adventurers' guilds, dystopian human habitats, and many more fantastic peoples and disturbing individuals.
▪ It starts off with an odd wizard seeking refuge in a lighthouse, but he will make it around the world eventually.
