▪ You meet Yves in his adulthood, with recurring flashback-chapters revealing the entirety of his life. There are no promises that it is a good life. Or that he is a good person.
▪ Images, songs and music [such as in Ch. 12].
▪ Quite a bit of rhyming and experiments with layout and fonts to expose the characters' mental state or illustrate magical occurrences [feel invited to take a glimpse at Ch. 6.4 , 7.1 and 16.1 for a first impression].
▪ An author who is very slow but tries really hard.


Dear Traveller,
if this story fell into your hands, I hope it will give you something for the heart. It is for those who find comfort in lingering with a character through their journey, for those who seek a sense of solace in the pages they turn, just as my characters search for a purpose or place to belong. This story is for those who read because they wish to explore the depths of someone else's soul. Thank you for reading.

108553.title: The Isekai Warrior Mage [LitRPG Harem Fantasy]
108553.description:
Night City gives me no easy passes in life. Broke, hungry, and two bills away from sleeping in the back of Grandpa Reggie’s junkyard Impala, I have to find ways to make ends meet. Luckily, tonight I find myself a quick tutoring gig, a hot girl requesting my help for an impending chemistry exam. Not so lucky though, that same girl goes werewolf mode on me and tries to eat my heart out!

After a heated chase, I manage to escape by the skin of my teeth, an escape that left me spiraling into a fantasy world with dragons, Saber tooth tigers, and... beastly women? Thankfully, a high priestess of a female exclusive sect takes interest in me before I become dog food. To make matters more interesting, she calls me a prophecy, and my job is to not only defeat the Goblin King’s army, but to put an end to an evil island threatening to drag their beastkin village, and their entire world, into darkness.

With the help of my baby dragon, a zany leopardkin girl, and my now awakened demi-god powers, I will build my strength, one dungeon at a time.

--

What you’ll find: slow-burn harem with dungeon raiding and a weak to strong MC. Plus, a baby dragon!

Release Schedule: Several chapters upon launch, then 2 Chapters a week, M & F

❤Steamy scenes are exclusive to my Patreon to abide by RR rules❤

Read advanced chapters here!

118167.title: The Relic Warder's Daughter: The Cursed Canvas
118167.description:
Brenna's father is a Relic Warder. He travels the world tracking down dangerous supernatural items and locking them away, always dragging Brenna and her mom along for the ride. Born with an ability to perceive the supernatural, Brenna has been training to become a Warder herself since she was just a little girl. When her parents are killed by a powerful relic, Brenna is left an orphan. She's sent to live with her grandparents, who are determined to keep her as far away from the Warder community as possible. But just keeping her away from the Warders isn't enough to keep her safe from relics. When a supernatural painting from an antique shop traps Brenna and her new friends in a world of killer mummies, Brenna finds that she is their only protection. But she's only a half-trained thirteen-year-old girl. How can she possibly keep her untrained friends safe in a world made to drain their very lives away?

Warning: This book contains mummies and other assorted corpses, death, somewhat graphic injuries, somewhat more than somewhat graphic injuries, decidedly minor injuries, and various disturbing historic facts. Mainly Victorian. Victorians were weird.

125163.title: Just Add Mana
125163.description:
The more lives you've lived, the more mana you have, and Cale has lived too many lives to count.

At this point, his core is closer to the magical equivalent of a nuclear reactor. The downside to this is that conventional spells have become impossibly difficult to cast: Cale simply has too much mana. His spells collapse under the weight of his magic.

Then he finds himself summoned to a new world. One with a spellwork system capable of adjusting to his ridiculous reserves, creating new spells just for him.

Of course, things are never that simple. New magic means new things to learn, and if he wants to make spells worth having, that means going to a magic academy. On top of that, an old dragon has taken an interest in him, the kingdom's hunters seem alarmingly intent on attacking his classmates, and Cale's pretty sure at least one ancient evil has followed him from a past life.

But who knows? With magic back on the table, he might finally be able to perform what he sees as the true pinnacle of spellwork: baking.

--

Updates Tues/Thurs/Sat at ~7AM PT. Cover may change! This is a WIP by trichromachine and I have other comms in progress.

122106.title: Whispers of the End – A Tower Defense LitRPG
122106.description:
The world ended a hundred years ago. For the Warden, it ended five minutes ago.

Waking up in the Last Hope Penitentiary—humanity's final, crumbling bastion—he is tasked with an impossible mission: save what's left of the world by commanding the very 'Weapons' that were locked away for being too dangerous. With a cynical AI as his only guide and monsters at every door, he must learn to lead, survive, and stare back when death stares him in the face.

In a world of monsters, the most dangerous one might be the person you're forced to trust.

93885.title: FOR ALL IT REVOLVES AROUND
93885.description:
THE PROMISE OF A MESSIAH 

It is said that an Isekai's world revolves around them... Well, not in this world, at least not yet, since a prophecy, especially in this one, will always cast a shadow over someone from another world. The realm where legends, myths, and folklore come to life, transforming into a eulogy for the royals, the self-proclaimed "Saviours of these worlds." However, there are numerous royal families rather than simply one and what do they all have in common? The lies that they tell to the masses. 

I'm one of them. 

What to expect:

• A slow world building filled with fantasy .

• The MC is the "strongest" 

• World Power System

• Chapters - 2-4k Words Average 

• Doing my best for 4 chapters a month!

101164.title: Experiment CX21: The Night it Was Unleashed
101164.description:
Episodes release every Wednesday and Thursday.
Collin is offered $10,000 a week to be experimented on by a mysterious scientist. Desperate to support his wife and his daughter, he takes the offer. The consequences of the experiment are more life changing than Colin could have ever known. After witnessing his own death, Colin needs to find his way back to his family and regain his memories before they suffer the same fate.
Elements in the story:

Gradual growth via consumption 

Man vs Nature

Man Vs Self

Bio based magic system 

Multiple perspectives including villains

124395.title: Death, Heck, and Glory (Necromanfluencer 1)
124395.description:
I’m Heck McTyre: freelance necromancer, wannabe influencer, and voluntary insomniac.

It's been 60 hours since I slept--four since my last cup of coffee. I'm jittery as a crack-addled raccoon when the sheriff hires me for a séance over an unmarked grave and sanctions a live unboxing. But rather than chat a corpse's ear off, my audience watches me pry open an empty coffin and a hundred-year-old conspiracy.

While insomnia scrambles my brain like a morning fry-up, my hometown plots to bury me and its secret alike.

Follow me, not for the views... but because I might not survive the next unboxing.

WHAT TO EXPECT:

• A world of snark -- everyone sasses everyone

• A well-intended, flawed, broke-ass protagonist crawling his way across the finish line

• Some spooky vibes but nothing horrific

• More emotions than you might think

UPDATE SCHEDULE:

Daily until the end of book one, then every Wednesday and Saturday.

121610.title: A Dragon Called Bob [Isekai - LitRPG - Dragon Evolution]
121610.description:
Karma's a bitch, and then you hoard.

Being isekai’d into the body of a dragon whose only task is to guard and grow a pile of shiny treasure seemed like a win to Bob. Flight, Might, Bite — and all it cost him was dying? Fair trade! There’s even a dungeon core as a bonus to his starting pile of treasure!  The system claimed this was a downgrade from his human life, but it didn’t feel like it… at first. 

Unfortunately, his dungeon sprite is a borderline-psychotic 1200-year-old pixie from a cultivation world who just missed out on becoming a god.  She isn’t happy about interning for a lizard, and her idea of positive conflict resolution involves punching Bob’s minions in their balls until they do as they’re told.

The challenges are endless for a newly hatched dragon.  The looming threat of idiots with magic swords looking to take his head, a dungeon to grow, a sudden tendency to salivate whenever virgin sacrifices are mentioned, and a burning desire to expand his hoard.

Worst of all, Bob has to learn how to be a better person, or he’ll find out what the next downgrade will be.

✨ Two separate LitRPG-lite systems for Bob! (Draconic Evolution and Dungeon Core)

🔥 Breath Weapons!  Sharp claws!  …Business acumen?

⚔️ Strong to Stronger MC

📚 A world inspired by the likes of Terry Pratchett and Douglas Adams. 

⚫ Bawdy humour and zany side characters.

⏳ Release schedule: Mon-Fri

⚔️ Read 30 chapters ahead on Patreon!

84334.title: Alpha Agent: A LitRPG Adventure [STUBBED]
84334.description:
Dan Erikson took a machete to the back. A memorable start to his career as an agent.

In the polluted, crime-filled streets of New York, Dan is left for dead after a disastrous encounter with another gang. But the mysterious Alpha Corporation intervenes and drags him from the brink of death. They give him a choice: serve or die.

Transported to the other side of the world, Dan is introduced to a new bizarre landscape of stats, armor and weapons in a world of warring shards. The corporation assigns him his first real mission: crush a rebellion in the city of Amethyst.

Dan quickly discovers his new powers as a shard agent, a mass-produced super-soldier of the Alpha Corp.

Is Dan up for the job? Or will he be another statistic in the Alpha Corp’s desperate arms race against rival shards?

About the series: Follow Dan in Alpha Agent, a weak to strong protagonist in a pulse-pounding LitRPG Adventure set in a cyberpunk and fantasy world. Sink your teeth into a world with missions, challenges, and a progression fantasy in a war between various factions. This journey will captivate fans of The Primal Hunter, Iron Prince, and System Awakening.

Available on Amazon KU, Kindle and Paperback!


Book 1 (Amethyst raid): Ch. 1 - 39
Book 2 (Heist): Ch. 40 - 86
Book 3 (Combat Games): Ch. 87 - 130
Book 4: Ch. 131 - 187

Subscribe to my Patreon for as low as $5 to read ten chapters ahead!

Join the discord here!

85590.title: Zealot
85590.description:
This is a normal story about normal things, told in a normal way. It involves a normal character who has no desire to kill any gods, in fact, this character lives a very normal life and doesn’t die more than people usually do, this character totally doesn’t swear her allegiance to the burgeoning, slightly bratty goddess of darkness, in her war against the goddess of light, due to any sort of vendetta. That wasn’t overly specific and therefore suspicious, and lastly but most importantly, the goddess of death does not like wontons.

*Note: an undisclosed percentage of this description is comprised entirely of lies.

New Chapter every 2-4 weeks on Friday.

Cover by: VyarkX

*Content warnings explained:

Profanity: Mainly erring on the side of caution, there's swearing in the book so I gave it the tag, I personally don't believe it's excessive, but better have people going in knowing it's there if they're especially sensitive towards it.

Graphic violence: This book get's very violent, and I'm not going to shy away from that. There are some bad people and they do bad things, some worse than others. This book is Characters first so, if I believe it's something that character would do in that situation, considering their current mental state, they'll do it. Even so, chapter 2 acts as a sort of more explicit warning, if you can't handle chapter 2, you probably won't like the violence in this book. Although I should say, that as a general rule I try to make extreme violence sort of infrequent, your chapter to chapter violence level should be no worse than an action move, just a bit more descriptive. Like I won't ever go into too much detail, but if a monster gets exploded with a grenade, I'll mention the bits.

Sensitive Content: This is an expansion on the "There are some bad people and they do bad things" statement from earlier. I generally won't go into excessive detail with some of the harsher ones on the tag's description, but if something happens it will be talked about in a serious manner, I'm not one to shy away from such topics. Specifically, there is: deliberate mental abuse, self harm(light), mental illness, torture, and substance abuse. Note these instances are all taken out of context, and in context they don't come off as harsh as the words in this warning, it's mostly on the level of what could be overlooked without you going back and thinking "Yeah I suppose that counts." Note, I am not here to tell a super dark story or anything, I'm just into realism, and some sections of reality are worse than others. 

All that said, this book is supposed to be overall quite light-hearted and witty, but at the same time it has some serious moments. But most of that is to raise the stakes for when someone fights off a dragon with a minigun.

84349.title: Sworded Affair
84349.description: Polishing antiques in the basement was supposed to be a punishment. When monsters arrived, it saved Emma's life. Now sealed inside a suit of armor old when the world was young, Emma Knight will have to master newfound powers she'd long regarded as merely myth; all whilst navigating the breakdown of society and delving through dungeons in search of the truth behind the apocalypse. How's that for a Sworded Affair?

109645.title: Where the Dead Things Bloom [Romantically Apocalyptic Systemfall Litrpg]
109645.description:
My Second Life is a Dog-Gone Mess!

Drowning in a bathtub should've been the end of my problems, not the beginning of weirder ones.

Now I'm stuck in a reality where things refuse to die properly, buildings sprout tentacles, and my new "best friend" is a talking, humanoid husky-girl who swears we grew up together. Between dodging electric bee swarms and taking advice from a tinfoil-hat guru, with my Reconstitution at zero and her unwavering loyalty at max, we're heading back home—wherever that is now in this System-shattered world.

What to Expect in This Series:
-Light Litrpg 
-Numbers that go up when you kill questionable things
-Dogged Siberian Husky and other waifus with emotional baggage [Eventual harem]
-Original art and music by me and my team
-Slow burn romance
-Love, death, memory loss & overcoming the end of reality itself to get your best friend back
-Dimensional shenanigans, reality-shifting wishes, time loops, infinite shops and dungeon delving days

Assisting Illustrators: Mabiruna, Sheep_User, Lenika

37159.title: Symphony: A Sci-fi LitRPG Adventure: Book 1 Stubbed. Series complete.
37159.description:
Fresh off a break-up and now unemployed, veteran and former high school English teacher Walker Reed is ready to succumb to a grim and hopeless depression. But when an enigmatic stranger stops him in the street, he’s suddenly hurled into another dimension.

There, Walker gets to build his own world from scratch following the Alpha Protocol, which invites special individuals from across the universe to become “Creators”―generating everything from their own land masses and celestial bodies to a comprehensive, recorded religion.

With the help of his robotic assistant, Virgil―who happens to be a four-foot-tall squirrel―Walker sets about building out his geography, evolutionary systems, and creatures. But it’s not like playing in a sandbox, and he quickly realizes his creations can have world-ending consequences. Not to mention the creators are regularly pitted against one another in the Creator Wars . . .

As if all that weren’t bad enough, if Walker can’t complete the Alpha Protocol, he’ll be sent back to his previous reality where new, dark roads await. As he unlocks new systems and paths, can he balance his desire to be a peaceful, benevolent, and ethical god? Or will everything devolve into chaos?

Worldbuilding!

System designing!

Making monsters!

God battles!

Symphony is a novel with a blend of Sci-fi and LitRPG, that shows the reader how a LitRPG world comes to be. This is the first book in a series of novels planned around the Symphony universe.

Release schedule: M & F at 1:00 p.m. C.S.T. with a standard size of 3k up to 6k words, depending on the content.

Author's note: This is a work in progress. The final draft form will be published on Kindle, Kindle Unlimited, Paperback, and Audible.

Discord information: Link

[Winner of the Fall 2023 Writathon challenge]

124491.title: Quest for Views [YOUTUBERS IN FANTASY WORLD]
124491.description:
Four teenagers survive—and thrive—as YouTubers in Integrated Earth. 

They fight monsters, explore portals to other realities, discover ancient magic secrets, and take absurd risks to make their channel grow.

What to expect?

Four friends in a magically augmented van, road-tripping across Europe pursuing their dreams.

Characters willing to risk their lives for the greater good (and the perfect thumbnail).

A goblin [Videographer]. 

Violence. This is a violent world. And the characters don’t give a damn. 

A realistic Internet with sites like dragon-hunter-fails.com and secret forums where people share powerful magic spells.

For copyright reasons, YouTube is called Live-Quest.

Loot, like, and subscribe!

112557.title: I Swear I'm Not A Dark Lord!
112557.description:
Another death, another world, another chance to live a peaceful life. All he wants to do is practice his magic and go fishing. A peaceful, pleasant existence nobody should complain about.

As if! His family abandoned him; His new body is cursed; The gods meddle with his life; The local mayor shoves responsibilities at him; A weird kid keeps popping up and challenging him to duels; People keep asking him if he wants to be a dark lord.

Who has time for all of that when there are books to read and a lunker of a trout hiding away in the river?

Join an isekai hero in his not-quiet-enough life.

Writeathon Winner, Spring 2025

This is the next life of the MC from Isekai Veteran, but the story stands well on its own.

Updates Tuesday and Friday.

124533.title: Time Sovereign: Save, Load, Continue [Litrpg/Time Loop/Hunter]
124533.description:
[You Died.]

[Death may be the end for some, but for you, it's just a new beginning.]

[Try again?]

[Yes or No…]

Fifty-seven years ago, humanity faced near extinction but managed to survive thanks to Hunters, humans who awakened special powers and fought monsters.

Now in 2077, becoming a hunter was a job many awakened aspired to, be it for fame, wealth, justice, or just vengeance. 

Cain was no different. Made an orphan by a dungeon break eight years ago, he sought to become a hunter.

There was just one problem. Even after eight years of training, not only did he not progress, but his power regressed instead. Making him the first I-rank Hunter on Earth. 

With his magical circuit corrupted by the abyss, and his guild discarding him, his lifelong dream of becoming an official hunter looked to be forever out of reach.

 

Until one day he died... and woke up the day before with a new class and an opportunity to enter the Tower of Trials.

Now that he had unlimited chances to train and engage in deadly fights, just how far could he go?

How many deaths will it take to reach the top?

_________

If you like stories like SSS Suicide Hunter, Omniscient Reader, Eternally Regressing Knight etc. Then I think you will find mine interesting. 

What to expect:

-Tower Ascension 

-Dungeon Exploration 

-Monster Extermination

-Power Progression 

-Time Manipulation.

101789.title: Sword Saint's Reincarnation - a LitRPG Adventure
101789.description:
The greatest warrior is reborn as the lowest wastrel.

As the Sword Saint, the greatest swordmaster in the world, there was no place Roland couldn't go. No enemy he couldn't defeat. 

But pursuing strength above all else was not without consequences. The price of his power? Death at the hands of his brother, the last surviving member of his family.

Now reborn in the body of Rylan—the greatest shame of the Flameheart family—Roland refuses to waste his second chance. He already had the capability and the drive, but now he also has the wisdom and knowledge of what is truly important. He won't forsake his family again.

Reaching the peak will be easy. Doing so while remaining true to his newfound convictions will be much harder.

There's just one problem—the criminal underworld won't let their biggest customer go so easily.


What to expect:
. Reincarnation LitRPG

. Swordsman MC in a world of magic, but he'll also learn some magic, especially later on

. Strong to OP progression

. Third person

. Not a murderhobo

. There will likely be some romance in the future. No harem

* Daily chapters while still in Rising Stars

59557.title: Hedge Knight [Epic Progression Fantasy]
59557.description:
Arc 1: The Knight from Nothing has been stubbed upon the revised book release on 3/25/25 in accordance to Amazon's Kindle Unlimited policies. You can find the book release HERE. Additionally, free book promos will be announced to all members, including free ones, on my Patreon, which you can find HERE

Fortune favors the bold. For Helbram? He’ll have to make due with relentlessness instead.

A lifetime of denial, combined with a condition that has left him without the spiritual powers of the Awoken or the magical might of Mages, has cracked and scuffed an unbreaking will that continues to march along a path that seems to deny him at every step. Ambition still burns within, but it’s been reduced to embers, fueling hands that still reach for goals that remain out of reach.

Or so he thought.

A mission to wipe out a band of bandits goes wrong and Helbram is forced into a fight for survival along with the stragglers of the failed expedition, trapped by technology from an age long past. Within the chaos of this conflict, the faded flames of dead dreams spark anew.

And the first steps of a legend make themselves known.

Inspired by the likes of Final Fantasy, D&D, Wheel of Time, The Name of the Wind, and Cradle; The Knight from Nothing opens the doors to a world of epic fantasy with a progression twist along with elements of magical science, action, and adventure in the vein of old school Sword and Sorcery novels. 

Join one man in the struggle of the powerless against the powerful. This is the story of the Hedge Knight.

--

Cover Art by the amazing KartStudioDigi

To read further ahead and get access to the Audiobook version of this story consider supporting me on Patreon. Regardless, I hope you enjoy this story and have yourselves a very pleasant day!

121189.title: Heart of the Cosmos
121189.description:
Kaito is the only known human left in a universe where humanity is extinct. Almost everyone wants him dead. But something… or someone wants him alive. He’s hunted by intergalactic governments and haunted by the mysterious power growing inside him. With the help of the S-ranked elven Star Traveler captain Elara and her crew, the Starlight, Kaito journeys across countless worlds, clashing with empires, cosmic well guardians, and the demons of his and the universe’s past—all in search of one thing…

The Cosmic Heart.

Heart of the Cosmos is a sci-fi, shonen-meets-seinen space opera with martial arts, interstellar warfare, cosmic powers, and emotional moments.
*For fans of Naruto/Boruto, One Piece, Fate, Bleach, and Star Wars.
**Release date - Tuesday, Thursday, Saturday

122568.title: Earth's Assessment
122568.description:
When Earth faces extinction in an alien death game, one average guy makes a desperate gamble—and accidentally becomes humanity's most overpowered player.

Mike Kowalski was nobody special. A middle manager with a dad bod, a wife and kid, trying to caost through life on the path of least resistance. Then he woke up in a concrete cell with an impossible choice: represent humanity in a deadly competition against nine alien species, or die on the spot.

The rules are simple: 100 humans must compete for Earth's survival. Win, and humanity joins the galactic Federation. Lose, and the species gets deleted from existence. Everyone starts at level 1, choosing basic abilities and fighting tutorial monsters.

Everyone except Mike.

Through a desperate gamble with impossible odds, intending to dodge this competition altogether,  Mike enters the competition at level 100. As a Pattern Weaver with unexpected abilities he does not begin to understand, he may be able to decipher the hidden layers of the universe itself. But his massive advantage comes with a terrible price: complete isolation from the other humans who might take forever to catch up, if at all. Moreover, beginning at level 100 is more complicated than one might think.

Now Mike must navigate an RPG-like system, face challenges designed for entire teams, and make choices that will determine not just his survival—but whether humanity has any chance at all.

Earth’s Assessment is a darkly optimistic LitRPG that asks the ultimate question: if you could save your species by becoming something much beyond normal, would you? Or is it even worth the effort?


What to expect:
An evolving world with all sorts of plot twists and turns

Meaningful character arcs

A lot of things are different than they seem at first, so be ready for surprises, meaningful character arcs, and a mix of genre tropes with unique twists.

Schedule:
A daily chapter (two if they're relatively short) for the first couple of weeks, and then five each week. Release days will be Mon, Tue, Thu, Sat and Sun.

I would love to read your comments, they would be very much appreciated.

87922.title: Video Game Developer in a Cultivation World
87922.description: James was a hustler who'd succeeded in retiring early, only for the pandemic to ruin all of his plans. He spent two years locked up inside playing video games and watching movies, only to be spiritually abducted just as the situation started improving. Now his name is Jin and he's a part of the Illusion Room Sect. A cultivation sect that creates scenarios for combat-focused cultivators to hone their skills. In other words, fully immersive video games. Will the gaming knowledge of his past life help him succeed in such a cut-throat world? Will he manage to break his two-year pandemic induced dry-spell? And most importantly, will he ever manage to surpass the rank of cannon fodder?

120420.title: Destiny Among the Stars - Scifi - LitRPG - Adventure
120420.description:
They left Earth for the stars and stumbled into a war older than Earth itself.

Humanity has dreamed of the stars for millennia, and when the System arrived on Earth, they finally got their chance.

But this isn't a story about magic and fireballs. The System grants passive skills and pushes humanity forward through technology, turning ordinary people into the architects of our interstellar future.

This is how Captain Luca Rossi and his crew of level-capped twenty-year-olds from New Hampshire seize humanity's destiny and pull out of the Solar System.

While portals spill monsters onto Earth, our crew masters spacecraft engineering, stellar navigation, and survival skills.

The future is dangerous.

Expect asphyxiation, radiation poisoning, political drama, and ruined civilizations. But also expect friendship, love, humor, and the unbreakable human spirit.

Climb aboard the Triumph of Darron for the maiden voyage to Alpha Centauri.

No harem.

Slow-burn.

Discord Link: https://discord.gg/JkDC3CJupC

Inspired by: GURPS, X4 Foundation, Eve Online, MOO, Stellaris, No Man’s Sky.
